<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0">
<title>TerraZoo · Inteligência Comercial · Live</title>
<link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
<style>
@font-face {
  font-family: 'AllerDisplay';
  src: url('data:font/truetype;base64,') format('truetype');
  font-weight: bold;
  font-style: normal;
}
@font-face {
  font-family: 'Aller';
  src: url('data:font/truetype;base64,') format('truetype');
  font-weight: normal;
  font-style: normal;
}

/* ══ RESET & TOKENS ══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
:root{
  --bg:#f0f4f0;--bg2:#e4ece4;--bg3:#d8e4d8;
  --card:rgba(255,255,255,1);--card2:rgba(255,255,255,.8);
  --border:rgba(45,107,74,.18);--border2:rgba(45,107,74,.12);
  --g1:#2d6b4a;--g2:#3a8a5c;--g3:#1a4a32;
  --text:#1a2e22;--muted:rgba(26,46,34,.55);
  --red:#e05555;--yellow:#c87010;--orange:#e8a050;--blue:#3a7fd5;
}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Aller',sans-serif;min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden;}
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 0%,rgba(45,107,74,.04) 0%,transparent 60%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 100%,rgba(45,107,74,.03) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none;z-index:0;}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#e4ece4;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(45,107,74,.2);border-radius:2px;}

/* ══ LOADING ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
#loading-screen{
  position:fixed;inset:0;background:#f0f4f0;z-index:9999;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:20px;
}
.spin{width:48px;height:48px;border:3px solid rgba(94,217,160,.15);border-top-color:var(--g1);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .8s linear infinite;}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.load-txt{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.55);}
.load-progress{width:220px;height:3px;background:rgba(45,107,74,.12);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;}
.load-bar{height:3px;background:var(--g1);border-radius:2px;width:0%;transition:width .4s ease;}

/* ══ ERROR ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
#error-screen{
  position:fixed;inset:0;background:#f0f4f0;z-index:9998;
  display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:14px;padding:32px;
}
.err-icon{font-size:40px;}
.err-title{font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#e05555;}
.err-msg{font-size:12px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.55);text-align:center;max-width:480px;line-height:1.6;}
.err-btn{background:#2d6b4a;border:none;color:#3a4a3e;padding:10px 24px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;margin-top:8px;}

/* ══ SIDEBAR LAYOUT ══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Aller',sans-serif;min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden;display:flex;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;-moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;text-rendering:optimizeLegibility;}
#app-sidebar{width:210px;flex-shrink:0;background:#2d6b4a;display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:100vh;z-index:200;overflow:hidden;}
#app-sidebar-brand{padding:18px 16px 14px;}
.hdr-name{font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:17px;color:#ffffff;letter-spacing:-.3px;}
.hdr-name span{color:#7dd4a0;}
.hdr-sub{font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px;}
#app-sidebar-divider{height:0.5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);margin:0 14px;}
#app-sidebar-nav{padding:10px 10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
.sb-tab{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:9px 10px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.3px;text-transform:uppercase;border:none;background:none;width:100%;text-align:left;}
.sb-tab:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);}
.sb-tab.on{background:rgba(255,255,255,.18);color:#ffffff;}
.sb-tab svg{width:16px;height:16px;flex-shrink:0;opacity:.7;}
.sb-tab.on svg{opacity:1;}
#app-sidebar-controls{padding:12px 12px 14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;}
#app-sidebar-divider2{height:0.5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);margin:0 14px 8px;}
.live-dot{width:7px;height:7px;background:#7dd4a0;border-radius:50%;animation:blink 2s infinite;flex-shrink:0;}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}}
.date-picker{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);color:#ffffff;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;outline:none;appearance:none;-webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='10' height='10' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='%23ffffff' stroke-width='3'><polyline points='6 9 12 15 18 9'/></svg>");background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:right 8px center;padding-right:24px;transition:all .2s;}
.date-picker:hover{background-color:rgba(255,255,255,.25);}
.date-picker option{background:#2d6b4a;color:#ffffff;}
.ts-pill{font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;}
.ts-pill strong{color:rgba(255,255,255,.9);}
.btn-refresh{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);color:#ffffff;padding:7px 10px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.5px;transition:all .2s;width:100%;}
.btn-refresh:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.25);}
.btn-refresh.loading svg{animation:spin 1s linear infinite;}
.btn-refresh svg{width:12px;height:12px;}
#app-content{margin-left:210px;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:100vh;}

/* ══ TABS (removidas do topo — agora na sidebar) ═══════════════════ */
.tabs{display:none!important;}
.hdr{display:none!important;}

/* ══ SIDEBAR COLLAPSE ════════════════════════════════════════════ */
#app-sidebar{transition:width .25s ease;}
#app-sidebar.collapsed{width:56px;}
#app-sidebar.collapsed #sidebar-logo,
#app-sidebar.collapsed #sidebar-sub,
#app-sidebar.collapsed .sb-tab span,
#app-sidebar.collapsed .ts-pill,
#app-sidebar.collapsed #sidebar-author,
#app-sidebar.collapsed .date-picker,
#app-sidebar.collapsed .btn-refresh span,
#app-sidebar.collapsed #app-sidebar-divider,
#app-sidebar.collapsed #app-sidebar-divider2{display:none!important;}
#app-sidebar.collapsed .sb-tab{justify-content:center;padding:11px 0;width:100%;}
#app-sidebar.collapsed #app-sidebar-controls{padding:10px 6px;align-items:center;}
#app-sidebar.collapsed .btn-refresh{padding:8px;justify-content:center;width:100%;}
#app-sidebar.collapsed #app-sidebar-brand{padding:12px 6px 8px;justify-content:center;}
#app-sidebar.collapsed #app-sidebar-nav{padding:8px 4px;}
#app-sidebar.collapsed #app-sidebar-brand::after{content:'🌿';font-size:18px;display:block;}
#app-content.expanded{margin-left:56px;}
#sidebar-toggle{position:absolute;bottom:14px;right:-13px;width:24px;height:24px;background:#2d6b4a;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);border-radius:50%;color:#ffffff;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:201;transition:transform .25s;}
#app-sidebar.collapsed #sidebar-toggle{transform:rotate(180deg);}

/* ══ BRIDGE full width ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.bridge-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px;}
#s-br{width:100%;}
#s-br .card{border-radius:10px;}

/* ══ OV TOP ROW: seg bars left (2/3) + item crítico right (1/3) ══ */
#ov-top-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px;align-items:start;}

/* ══ SEG BARS compact ════════════════════════════════════════════ */
#ov-seg-bars .seg-row{margin-bottom:6px;}

@media(max-width:1100px){.g4{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}.bridge-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);}}

/* ══ LAYOUT ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.main{padding:18px 24px 40px;width:100%;position:relative;z-index:1;box-sizing:border-box;}
.sec{display:none;}
.sec.on{display:block;animation:fadeUp .2s ease;}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.g4{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.g2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.g3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.g31{display:grid;grid-template-columns:3fr 2fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px;}

.kpi{background:#2d6b4a;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:13px;padding:17px 20px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .2s,transform .15s;}
.kpi:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.kpi::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.3);opacity:.7;}
.kpi-lbl{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);margin-bottom:7px;}
.kpi-val{font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:700;line-height:1;color:#ffffff;}
.kpi-sub{font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);margin-top:5px;}
.kpi-tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:8px;margin-top:5px;font-weight:600;}
.tag-r{background:rgba(255,100,100,.25);color:#ffaaaa;}
.tag-g{background:rgba(125,212,160,.2);color:#7dd4a0;}

/* ══ CARDS ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.card{background:#ffffff;border:1px solid #c5d9c5;border-radius:13px;padding:17px;}
.ch{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:13px;}
.ct{font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1a2e22;}
.cb{font-size:9px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.55);background:rgba(45,107,74,.08);padding:3px 8px;border-radius:7px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;}
.cb.g{color:#2d6b4a;background:rgba(45,107,74,.1);}

/* ══ SEGMENT BARS ════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.sbr{margin-bottom:6px;}
.sbh{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:2px;}
.sbn{font-size:10px;font-weight:500;}
.sbv{display:flex;gap:8px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;}
.sbb{height:4px;background:rgba(45,107,74,.1);border-radius:3px;position:relative;}
.sbf{height:4px;border-radius:3px;transition:width .7s ease;}
.meta-tick{position:absolute;top:-3px;width:1.5px;height:11px;background:rgba(45,107,74,.4);border-radius:1px;}

/* ══ TABLE ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px;}
.tbl th{text-align:left;padding:6px 9px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.5);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:500;border-bottom:1px solid #c5d9c5;}
.tbl td{padding:7px 9px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(45,107,74,.06);}
.tbl tr:last-child td{border:none;}
.tbl tr:hover td{background:rgba(45,107,74,.04);}
.rk{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.45);}

/* ══ LOJA CARDS ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.lg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:9px;}
.lc{background:#fff;border:1px solid #c5d9c5;border-radius:10px;padding:11px 13px;transition:all .2s;cursor:pointer;}
.lc:hover{border-color:#2d6b4a;background:rgba(45,107,74,.04);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.lc.crit{border-color:rgba(224,85,85,.4);background:rgba(224,85,85,.03);}
.lc.warn{border-color:rgba(232,160,80,.3);}
.lnm{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(26,46,34,.45);margin-bottom:5px;}
.lp{font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;}
.lv{font-size:9px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.45);margin-top:1px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;}
.lbg{height:3px;background:rgba(45,107,74,.1);border-radius:2px;margin-top:7px;}
.lbf{height:3px;border-radius:2px;}

/* ══ PILLS / FILTERS ═════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.fls{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:13px;}
.fp{background:rgba(45,107,74,.07);border:1px solid #c5d9c5;border-radius:14px;padding:4px 11px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;color:rgba(26,46,34,.55);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.3px;}
.fp:hover{color:#1a2e22;}
.fp.on{background:#2d6b4a;color:#ffffff;border-color:#2d6b4a;}

/* ══ BRIDGE CARDS ════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.bridge-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px;}

/* ══ SIDEBAR COLLAPSIBLE ══════════════════════════════════════════ */
#app-content{transition:margin-left .25s ease;}

/* ══ OV LAYOUT ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
#ov-top-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px;align-items:start;}
.bsc{background:#2d6b4a;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:12px;padding:15px;border-top:3px solid var(--bc,rgba(255,255,255,.4));}
.bsc-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;}
.bsc-val{font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;line-height:1;margin-bottom:4px;}
.bsc-pct{font-size:11px;color:#ffffff!important;margin-top:2px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;}

/* ══ DRAWER ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
#loja-drawer{position:fixed;right:-490px;top:0;width:460px;height:100vh;background:#e8f0e8;border-left:1px solid #c5d9c5;z-index:500;transition:right .3s ease;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:-4px 0 24px rgba(45,107,74,.12);}
#loja-drawer.open{right:0;}
#drawer-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0 0 0 210px;background:rgba(45,107,74,.25);z-index:499;backdrop-filter:blur(2px);}
#drawer-overlay.open{display:block;}

/* ══ SEG INFO ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.seg-info{background:rgba(0,0,0,.2);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;display:flex;gap:20px;margin-bottom:13px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.si-item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;}
.si-lbl{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.si-val{font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;}
.stb{display:inline-block;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:10px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;}
.stb-crit{background:rgba(224,85,85,.12);color:#c03030;}
.stb-ok{background:rgba(45,107,74,.1);color:#2d6b4a;}
/* Pills inside green rs-header */
#rs-header .fp{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);}
#rs-header .fp:hover{color:#ffffff;background:rgba(255,255,255,.25);}
#rs-header .fp.on{background:#ffffff;color:#2d6b4a;border-color:#ffffff;}
#rs-header .stb-ok{background:rgba(168,240,200,.2);color:#a8f0c8;}
#rs-header .stb-crit{background:rgba(255,100,100,.2);color:#ff9999;}

/* ══ CHART WRAP ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.chart-container{position:relative;}
.fs-btn{position:absolute;top:6px;right:6px;z-index:10;background:rgba(0,0,0,.35);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:6px;width:26px;height:26px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;color:#3a4a3e;transition:all .2s;opacity:0;}
.chart-container:hover .fs-btn{opacity:1;}
.fs-btn:hover{background:rgba(94,217,160,.2);color:var(--g1);}
.fs-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:#f0f4f0;z-index:9999;flex-direction:column;padding:20px;}
.fs-overlay.show{display:flex;}
.fs-title{color:#1a2e22;font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
.fs-close{cursor:pointer;color:rgba(26,46,34,.5);font-size:20px;background:none;border:none;}
.fs-canvas-wrap{flex:1;position:relative;}

/* ══ RESPONSIVE ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@media(max-width:1100px){.g4{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}.bridge-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);}}
@media(max-width:700px){.g2,.g31{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.g4{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}.main{padding:12px;}}

/* ══ DIAGNÓSTICO ON-SCREEN ═══════════════════════════════════════ */
#diag-btn{position:fixed;bottom:18px;right:18px;z-index:1000;background:rgba(45,107,74,.12);border:1px solid rgba(45,107,74,.35);color:#2d6b4a;padding:9px 14px;border-radius:22px;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.5px;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.35);transition:all .2s;display:none;}
#diag-btn:hover{background:rgba(45,107,74,.22);transform:translateY(-1px);}
#diag-modal{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(45,107,74,.75);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);z-index:9998;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;}
#diag-modal.show{display:flex;}
#diag-box{background:#f0f4f0;border:1px solid #c5d9c5;border-radius:14px;max-width:780px;width:100%;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;padding:22px 26px;position:relative;}
#diag-box h2{font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;color:#2d6b4a;font-size:18px;margin-bottom:6px;}
#diag-box .sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;margin-bottom:18px;}
#diag-content{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;line-height:1.7;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border-radius:8px;padding:14px 16px;white-space:pre-wrap;color:#cfe;max-height:55vh;overflow-y:auto;}
#diag-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:flex-end;}
#diag-actions button{background:var(--g3);border:none;color:#3a4a3e;padding:8px 18px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;}
#diag-actions button.sec{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:var(--text);}
.diag-tag-ok{color:#5ed9a0;}
.diag-tag-err{color:#ff6b6b;}
.diag-tag-warn{color:#ffd166;}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ══ DIAGNÓSTICO ══ -->
<button id="diag-btn" onclick="showDiag()">🐞 Diagnóstico</button>
<div id="diag-modal">
  <div id="diag-box">
    <h2>🔍 Diagnóstico das datas na base</h2>
    <div class="sub">Mostra quais datas o dashboard conseguiu ler de cada aba do Google Sheets.</div>
    <div id="diag-content">— sem dados ainda —</div>
    <div id="diag-actions">
      <button class="sec" onclick="copyDiag()">📋 Copiar</button>
      <button onclick="hideDiag()">Fechar</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ LOADING ══ -->
<div id="loading-screen">
  <div class="spin"></div>
  <div class="load-txt" id="load-msg">Conectando ao Google Sheets…</div>
  <div class="load-progress"><div class="load-bar" id="load-bar"></div></div>
</div>

<!-- ══ ERROR ══ -->
<div id="error-screen">
  <div class="err-icon">⚠️</div>
  <div class="err-title">Erro ao carregar dados</div>
  <div class="err-msg" id="err-msg">Não foi possível conectar ao Google Sheets. Verifique se a planilha está publicada como CSV público.</div>
  <button class="err-btn" onclick="loadAll()">Tentar novamente</button>
</div>

<!-- ══ SIDEBAR ══ -->
<aside id="app-sidebar" style="display:none">
  <div id="app-sidebar-brand" style="padding:8px 10px 4px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center">
    <img id="sidebar-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="TerraZOO" style="width:130px;display:block;object-fit:contain;margin:0 auto">
    <div class="hdr-sub" id="sidebar-sub" style="text-align:center;margin-top:2px">Inteligência Comercial</div>
  </div>
  <div id="app-sidebar-divider"></div>
  <nav id="app-sidebar-nav">
    <button class="sb-tab on" onclick="showTab('ov',this)">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg>
      Visão Geral
    </button>
    <button class="sb-tab" onclick="showTab('lj',this)">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg>
      Lojas
    </button>
    <button class="sb-tab" onclick="showTab('fn',this)">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="1" y="3" width="15" height="13"/><polygon points="16 8 20 8 23 11 23 16 16 16 16 8"/><circle cx="5.5" cy="18.5" r="2.5"/><circle cx="18.5" cy="18.5" r="2.5"/></svg>
      Fornecedores
    </button>
    <button class="sb-tab" onclick="showTab('br',this)">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M4 15s1-1 4-1 5 2 8 2 4-1 4-1V3s-1 1-4 1-5-2-8-2-4 1-4 1z"/><line x1="4" y1="22" x2="4" y2="15"/></svg>
      Bridge / CD
    </button>
    <button class="sb-tab" onclick="showTab('rs',this)">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="8" y1="6" x2="21" y2="6"/><line x1="8" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"/><line x1="8" y1="18" x2="21" y2="18"/><line x1="3" y1="6" x2="3.01" y2="6"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="3.01" y2="12"/><line x1="3" y1="18" x2="3.01" y2="18"/></svg>
      Rupt. Segmentos
    </button>
  </nav>
  <div id="app-sidebar-divider2"></div>
  <div id="app-sidebar-controls">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px">
      <div class="live-dot"></div>
      <select id="date-picker" class="date-picker" title="Selecione a data de referência">
        <option value="">— Carregando…</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="ts-pill">Atualizado: <strong id="ts">—</strong></div>
    <button class="btn-refresh" id="btn-refresh" onclick="loadAll()">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <polyline points="23 4 23 10 17 10"/><polyline points="1 20 1 14 7 14"/>
        <path d="M3.51 9a9 9 0 0114.85-3.36L23 10M1 14l4.64 4.36A9 9 0 0020.49 15"/>
      </svg>
      Atualizar
    </button>
    <button class="btn-refresh" onclick="openBriefing()" style="background:#e8a050;border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.2);font-weight:700;">
      ⚡ Briefing 9h
    </button>
    <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);text-align:center;margin-top:2px;letter-spacing:.3px" id="sidebar-author">Criado por Abner Santos</div>
  </div>
  <button id="sidebar-toggle" onclick="toggleSidebar()" title="Expandir/Recolher menu">‹</button>
</aside>

<!-- ══ HEADER (oculto — mantido para compatibilidade) ══ -->
<header class="hdr" style="display:none" id="app-header">
  <div class="hdr-brand"><div><div class="hdr-name">terra<span>ZOO</span></div></div></div>
</header>

<!-- ══ TABS (ocultas — mantidas para compatibilidade) ══ -->
<div class="tabs" style="display:none" id="app-tabs">
  <div class="tab on"  onclick="showTab('ov',this)">Visão Geral</div>
  <div class="tab"     onclick="showTab('lj',this)">Lojas</div>
  <div class="tab"     onclick="showTab('fn',this)">Fornecedores</div>
  <div class="tab"     onclick="showTab('br',this)">Bridge/CD</div>
  <div class="tab"     onclick="showTab('rs',this)">Ruptura Segmentos</div>
</div>

<!-- ══ MAIN ══ -->
<div id="app-content">
<div class="main" id="app-main" style="display:none">

<!-- VISÃO GERAL -->
<div class="sec on" id="s-ov">
  <div class="g4">
    <div class="kpi">
      <div class="kpi-lbl">% Ruptura</div>
      <div class="kpi-val" id="k-pct" style="color:#ff9999">—</div>
      <div class="kpi-sub" id="k-pct-s">carregando…</div>
      <div class="kpi-tag" id="k-pct-t"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi">
      <div class="kpi-lbl">Valor em Ruptura</div>
      <div class="kpi-val" id="k-val" style="color:#ffd166">—</div>
      <div class="kpi-sub" id="k-val-s"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi">
      <div class="kpi-lbl">DDE Geral</div>
      <div class="kpi-val" id="k-dde" style="font-size:40px;line-height:1;text-align:center;color:#7dd4a0">—</div>
      <div class="kpi-sub" style="text-align:center;margin-top:3px">Dias de estoque · Hoje</div>
      <div id="k-dde-forn" style="margin-top:8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi">
      <div class="kpi-lbl">Top 3 Segmentos (%)</div>
      <div id="k-seg" style="margin-top:6px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- Linha 1: Ruptura por Segmento (texto compacto 75%) + Item Crítico (25%) -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:3fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px;align-items:stretch">
    <div class="card" style="padding:0;overflow:hidden">
      <div style="background:#2d6b4a;padding:9px 17px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between">
        <div class="ct" style="color:#ffffff;font-size:11px">Ruptura por Segmento</div>
        <div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);font-size:9px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:7px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace" id="ov-sv">hoje</div>
      </div>
      <div id="ov-seg-bars" style="padding:10px 17px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:4px 12px"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="padding:12px 14px">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px">
        <span style="width:7px;height:7px;background:#ff6b6b;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;flex-shrink:0"></span>
        <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#1a2e22">Item Mais Crítico</span>
        <span class="cb g" id="top-item-date" style="font-size:8px;margin-left:auto">—</span>
      </div>
      <div id="top-item-body"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- Linha 2: Evolução Diária full width -->
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <div class="ch">
      <div class="ct">Evolução Diária — % Ruptura + DDE</div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:flex-end">
        <button class="fp on" id="ov-d15" onclick="setOvDays(15,this)">15d</button>
        <button class="fp" id="ov-d30" onclick="setOvDays(30,this)">30d</button>
        <button class="fp" id="ov-d60" onclick="setOvDays(60,this)">60d</button>
        <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-left:2px">|</span>
        <button class="fp on" id="ov-scd-btn" onclick="toggleOvCD('scd',this)">s/ CD</button>
        <button class="fp on" id="ov-ccd-btn" onclick="toggleOvCD('ccd',this)">c/ CD</button>
        <div class="cb" id="ov-sl" style="margin-left:2px">15d</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="chart-container"><div style="height:340px" class="cw"><canvas id="cSerie"></canvas></div>
    <button class="fs-btn" onclick="openFS('cSerie')">⛶</button></div>
  </div>
</div>



<!-- LOJAS -->
<div class="sec" id="s-lj">
  <!-- Dentro da meta + Acima da meta (tudo) -->
  <div class="g2" style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <div class="card" style="border-top:3px solid #5ed9a0">
      <div class="ch"><div class="ct" style="color:#5ed9a0">✓ Lojas Dentro da Meta</div><div class="cb g" id="lj-meta-cnt">—</div></div>
      <div id="lj-meta-list" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="border-top:3px solid #ff6b6b">
      <div class="ch"><div class="ct" style="color:#ff6b6b">🔴 Acima da Meta</div><div class="cb" style="color:#ff6b6b;background:rgba(255,107,107,.08)" id="lj-crit-cnt">—</div></div>
      <div id="lj-crit-list" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="ch"><div class="ct">Tabela por Loja</div></div>
    <table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Loja</th><th>%</th><th>R$</th><th>DDE</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="lj-tbl"></tbody></table>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FORNECEDORES -->
<div class="sec" id="s-fn">
  <div class="fls" id="fn-fps"></div>
  <!-- Top 3 fornecedores destaque -->
  <div class="g3" id="fn-top3" style="margin-bottom:12px"></div>
  <div class="g2">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="ch"><div class="ct">Top 10 Fornecedores</div><div class="cb g" id="fn-sel">Geral</div></div>
      <div class="chart-container"><div style="height:320px" class="cw"><canvas id="cForn"></canvas></div>
      <button class="fs-btn" onclick="openFS('cForn')">⛶</button></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="ch"><div class="ct">Ranking + DDE</div></div>
      <table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Fornecedor</th><th>Seg.</th><th>R$</th><th>%</th><th>DDE</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody id="fn-tbl"></tbody></table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- BRIDGE -->
<div class="sec" id="s-br">
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
    <button class="fp on" id="br-btn-geral" onclick="selBridgeMode('geral')">🌐 Geral</button>
    <button class="fp" id="br-btn-seg" onclick="selBridgeMode('seg')">📋 Por Segmento</button>
    <button class="fp" id="br-btn-loja" onclick="selBridgeMode('loja')">🏪 Por Loja</button>
  </div>
  <div id="br-seg-pills" style="display:none;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:8px"></div>
  <div id="br-loja-pills" style="display:none;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:8px"></div>
  <div class="bridge-grid" id="br-cards"></div>
  <div class="card" id="br-chart-area" style="width:100%">
    <div class="ch"><div class="ct">Bridge de Ruptura por Status</div><div class="cb g" id="br-sub">—</div></div>
    <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;margin-top:-4px;margin-bottom:4px">Clique em uma coluna para ver os itens</div>
    <div class="chart-container"><div style="height:420px" class="cw"><canvas id="cBridge"></canvas></div>
    <button class="fs-btn" onclick="openFS('cBridge')">⛶</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RUPTURA SEGMENTOS -->
<div class="sec" id="s-rs">
  <!-- Header sticky com info do segmento -->
  <div id="rs-header" style="background:#2d6b4a;border:none;border-radius:12px;padding:10px 18px;margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap">
    <div style="flex:1;min-width:200px">
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2px">Segmento</div>
      <div id="rs-seg-nm" style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:#7dd4a0">—</div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:24px;flex-wrap:wrap">
      <div><div style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase">% Ruptura</div>
        <div id="rs-h-pct" style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#ff9999">—</div></div>
      <div><div style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase">Valor R$</div>
        <div id="rs-h-val" style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#ffd166">—</div></div>
      <div><div style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase">Meta</div>
        <div id="rs-h-meta" style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#ffffff">—</div></div>
      <div><div style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase">DDE</div>
        <div id="rs-h-dde" style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#ffd166">—</div></div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;margin-top:4px">
        <div id="rs-h-status" class="stb stb-crit">—</div>
        <div id="rs-h-dde-status" class="stb stb-crit">—</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;align-items:flex-end;flex:2;min-width:300px">
      <!-- Pills de segmento -->
      <div class="fls" id="rs-fps" style="margin:0;justify-content:flex-end"></div>
      <!-- Controles: dias + toggle CD -->
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:flex-end">
        <span style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);letter-spacing:.3px">PERÍODO:</span>
        <button class="fp on" id="rs-dmes" onclick="setRsDays(0,this)">Mês</button>
        <button class="fp" id="rs-d30" onclick="setRsDays(30,this)">30d</button>
        <button class="fp" id="rs-d60" onclick="setRsDays(60,this)">60d</button>
        <span style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);letter-spacing:.3px;margin-left:4px">VISÃO:</span>
        <button class="fp on" id="rs-scd-btn" onclick="toggleRsCD('scd',this)">s/ CD</button>
        <button class="fp on" id="rs-ccd-btn" onclick="toggleRsCD('ccd',this)">c/ CD</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Gráfico principal + painel lateral -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 260px;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="ch">
        <div class="ct">% Ruptura · DDE · Dias de Estoque</div>
        <div class="cb g" id="rs-seg-lbl">—</div>
      </div>
      <div class="chart-container"><div style="height:360px" class="cw"><canvas id="cRsSeg"></canvas></div>
      <button class="fs-btn" onclick="openFS('cRsSeg')">⛶</button></div>
    </div>
    <!-- Painel lateral: bridge + top item -->
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px">
      <div id="rs-bridge-cards" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px"></div>
      <div id="rs-top-item-card" class="card" style="background:rgba(255,209,102,.06);border-color:rgba(255,209,102,.2)"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Tabela fornecedores (multi-dia estilo print) -->
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <div class="ch"><div class="ct">🏭 Top 10 Fornecedores — Últimos 3 Dias</div><div class="cb g" id="rs-forn-dt">—</div></div>
    <div style="overflow-x:auto">
      <table class="tbl" style="min-width:600px" id="rs-forn-tbl-wrap">
        <thead id="rs-forn-head"></thead>
        <tbody id="rs-forn-tbl"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- Painel itens do fornecedor -->
  <div id="rs-forn-items" style="display:none;margin-top:12px">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="ch">
        <div class="ct" id="rs-forn-items-title">Top 10 Itens</div>
        <button onclick="document.getElementById('rs-forn-items').style.display='none'" style="background:none;border:none;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:16px">✕</button>
      </div>
      <div id="rs-forn-items-list"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div><!-- /main -->
</div><!-- /app-content -->

<!-- ══ LOJA DRAWER ══ -->
<div id="drawer-overlay" onclick="closeDrawer()"></div>
<div id="loja-drawer">
  <div style="background:#d8e4d8;padding:15px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid #c5d9c5;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:5">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px">Detalhe da Loja</div>
      <div id="drawer-name" style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700"></div>
    </div>
    <button onclick="closeDrawer()" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;width:30px;height:30px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);font-size:14px">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div id="drawer-kpis" style="padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);display:flex;gap:16px"></div>
  <div style="padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2)">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px">
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted)">Segmentos Ofensores</div>
      <button id="drawer-seg-reset" onclick="drawerFilterSeg(null)" style="display:none;font-size:9px;background:rgba(45,107,74,.15);border:1px solid rgba(45,107,74,.3);border-radius:6px;padding:2px 8px;cursor:pointer;color:#2d6b4a;font-weight:600">← Todos</button>
    </div>
    <div id="drawer-segs"></div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:14px 18px">
    <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px" id="drawer-items-title">Top 10 Itens</div>
    <div id="drawer-items" style="background:rgba(0,0,0,.15);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:8px"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ BRIDGE DRILL-DOWN DRAWER ══ -->
<div id="br-overlay" onclick="closeBrDrawer()" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0 0 0 210px;background:rgba(45,107,74,.25);z-index:499;backdrop-filter:blur(2px)"></div>
<div id="br-drawer" style="position:fixed;right:-490px;top:0;width:460px;height:100vh;background:#e8f0e8;border-left:1px solid #c5d9c5;z-index:500;transition:right .3s ease;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:-4px 0 24px rgba(45,107,74,.12)">
  <div style="background:#d8e4d8;padding:15px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid #c5d9c5;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:5">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px">Bridge — Itens</div>
      <div id="br-dd-title" style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:#1a2e22">—</div>
    </div>
    <button onclick="closeBrDrawer()" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;width:30px;height:30px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);font-size:14px">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div id="br-dd-list" style="padding:14px 18px"></div>
</div>

<!-- ══ MODAL SENHA BRIEFING ══ -->
<div id="briefing-pwd-modal" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(45,107,74,.88);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);z-index:9999;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;">
  <div style="background:#f0f4f0;border:1px solid #c5d9c5;border-radius:16px;padding:28px 32px;width:100%;max-width:340px;text-align:center">
    <div style="font-size:28px;margin-bottom:12px">🔐</div>
    <div style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:#1a2e22;margin-bottom:6px">Briefing 9h</div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.5);margin-bottom:18px">Acesso restrito · Digite a senha</div>
    <input id="briefing-pwd-input" type="password" placeholder="Senha" style="width:100%;background:rgba(45,107,74,.08);border:1px solid #c5d9c5;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;color:#1a2e22;font-size:14px;outline:none;margin-bottom:8px;text-align:center;letter-spacing:4px"/>
    <div id="briefing-pwd-err" style="display:none;font-size:11px;color:#ff6b6b;margin-bottom:8px">Senha incorreta. Tente novamente.</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:4px">
      <button onclick="document.getElementById('briefing-pwd-modal').style.display='none'" style="flex:1;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#3a4a3e;padding:9px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px">Cancelar</button>
      <button onclick="checkBriefingPwd()" style="flex:1;background:rgba(255,209,102,.15);border:1px solid rgba(255,209,102,.3);color:#ffd166;padding:9px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:600">Entrar</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ MODAL BRIEFING ══ -->
<div id="briefing-modal" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(45,107,74,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);z-index:9998;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:16px;">
  <div style="background:#f0f4f0;border:1px solid #c5d9c5;border-radius:16px;width:100%;max-width:760px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;position:relative">
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid #c5d9c5;position:sticky;top:0;background:#f0f4f0;z-index:5">
      <div style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#ffd166">⚡ Briefing das 9h</div>
      <button onclick="document.getElementById('briefing-modal').style.display='none'" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:8px;width:28px;height:28px;cursor:pointer;color:#3a4a3e;font-size:14px">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div id="briefing-content" style="padding:16px 18px"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ FULLSCREEN ══ -->
<div class="fs-overlay" id="fsOverlay">
  <div class="fs-title">
    <span id="fsTitle">Gráfico</span>
    <button class="fs-close" onclick="closeFS()">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="fs-canvas-wrap"><canvas id="fsCanvas"></canvas></div>
</div>

<script>
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   CONFIGURAÇÃO — GIDs das abas do Google Sheets
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
const SHEET_BASE = 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/184Qxif7M1kDc84DvQC70W9TKHz4ToCejVvGFVHd1I44';
const GIDS = {
  base_dia   : '1475484739',  // BASE DIA A DIA
  base_seg   : '1570225034',  // BASE LINHA GRAFICO
  base_forn  : '1450706988',  // BASE FORNECEDORES (legacy)
  base_lojas : '1066519026',  // BASE LOJAS
  base_bridge: '284384358',   // BASE LOJAS - BRIDGE (itens críticos)
  base_geral : '1263408591',  // BASE PLANILHA GERAL (fornecedores)
  bridge     : '700485402',   // BRIDGE
  dde_geral  : '1808774321',  // DDE_GERAL
  dde_seg    : '808909603',   // DDE_SEGEMNTO
  dde_loja   : '1188386522',  // dde_loja
  dde_forn   : '1505059597',  // dde_fornecedor
  rup_cd     : '686471442',   // RUPTURA COM CD (geral, sem segmento)
  rup_cd_seg : '2125348850',  // RUPTURA COM CD POR SEGMENTO
};

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   CONFIGURAÇÃO DE DATA DE REFERÊNCIA
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   • DATE_OVERRIDE: força uma data específica no formato 'YYYY-MM-DD'.
     Ex: '2026-05-26'. Deixe '' para usar a auto-detecção.
   • SKIP_LAST_N_DAYS: SEMPRE ignora os últimos N dias da base.
     - 1 = sempre usa o penúltimo dia (recomendado: hoje quase sempre é parcial)
     - 0 = usa o último dia disponível
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
const DATE_OVERRIDE = '';        // ← Ex: '2026-05-26' para travar numa data
const SKIP_LAST_N_DAYS = 0;      // ← SEMPRE ignora o último dia da base

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   ESTADO GLOBAL
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
const D = {}; // todos os dados processados
const CHARTS = {};
const RAW = {};   // guarda os dados crus pra reprocessar quando trocar de data
let SELECTED_DATE = ''; // data escolhida pelo usuário (vazio = auto)
let LAST_DATE = null;
let OV_DAYS = 15; // dias exibidos no gráfico Evolução Diária
let RS_DAYS = 0;  // 0 = mês atual (padrão), ou número de dias
let OV_CD_SCD = true;  // OV: mostrar s/CD
let OV_CD_CCD = true;  // OV: mostrar c/CD
let RS_CD_SCD = true;  // RS: mostrar s/CD
let RS_CD_CCD = true;  // RS: mostrar c/CD
let CUR_SG = '', CUR_TS = '', CUR_RS = 'PET FOOD';
const SEG_METAS  = {
  'FOOD':8, 'FARMACIA':5, 'JARDINAGEM':15, 'AGROPECUARIA':12,
  'HIGIENE E BELEZA':13, 'ACESSORIOS':20, 'FAUNA':20, 'AQUARISMO':15, 'LAZER':20
};
// Mapa de normalização para variantes de nome de segmento na planilha
const SEG_ALIAS = {
  'PETFOOD':'FOOD','PET FOOD':'FOOD','FARMÁCIA':'FARMACIA','PET FARMACIA':'FARMACIA',
  'PETFARMACIA':'FARMACIA','HIGIENE E BELEZA':'HIGIENE E BELEZA','PET HIGIENE E BELEZA':'HIGIENE E BELEZA',
  'PETHIGIENE E BELEZA':'HIGIENE E BELEZA','PET ACESSORIOS':'ACESSORIOS','PETACESSORIOS':'ACESSORIOS',
  'PET FAUNA':'FAUNA','PETFAUNA':'FAUNA','PET AQUARISMO':'AQUARISMO','PETAQUARISMO':'AQUARISMO',
  'AGROPECUÁRIA':'AGROPECUARIA','JARDINAGEM':'JARDINAGEM','LAZER':'LAZER'
};
function normSeg(s){ if(!s) return ''; const up=s.trim().toUpperCase(); if(SEG_ALIAS[up]) return SEG_ALIAS[up]; const r=s.replace(/^PET /,'').replace(/^PET/,'').trim(); return r; }

// Metas DDE por segmento — Proposta DDE 180+ (linhas 68-81)
// Índice 0=mar/26, 1=abr/26, 2=mai/26, 3=jun/26, ... 9=dez/26
const DDE_META_SEG = {
  'FARMACIA':       [118, 117, 115, 113, 111, 110, 108, 108, 108, 108],
  'FOOD':           [ 62,  61,  61,  60,  59,  59,  58,  58,  58,  58],
  'JARDINAGEM':     [131, 128, 124, 121, 117, 113, 110, 110, 110, 110],
  'AGROPECUARIA':   [105, 102,  99,  96,  93,  90,  87,  87,  87,  87],
  'ACESSORIOS':     [381, 366, 351, 336, 321, 306, 291, 291, 291, 291],
  'HIGIENE E BELEZA':[88,  86,  85,  84,  82,  81,  80,  80,  80,  80],
  'FAUNA':          [ 95,  93,  91,  88,  86,  84,  82,  82,  82,  82],
  'AQUARISMO':      [168, 163, 158, 152, 147, 142, 136, 136, 136, 136],
  'LAZER':          [ 85,  83,  82,  80,  79,  77,  76,  76,  76,  76],
};
// Retorna meta DDE do segmento para o mês da data de referência
function getDdeMeta(seg, date){
  const metas = DDE_META_SEG[seg];
  if(!metas || !date) return null;
  const mes = date.getMonth()+1; // 1-12
  if(mes < 3) return metas[0]; // antes de mar usa mar
  if(mes > 12) return metas[9];
  return metas[mes - 3]; // mar=0, abr=1, ..., dez=9
}

const VALID_SEGS = Object.keys(SEG_METAS);
const GS = ['#5ed9a0','#4cbf8a','#3ca574','#2e8b5e','#7ff5b8','#9aebb2','#c4e8ce','#6bb5ff','#f4a85d'];
const tabInit = {ov:true};
let unidadeToNome = {}; // mapa número→nome de loja (global)

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   CSV UTILS
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function parseCsv(text){
  if(!text||text.length<5) return [];

  // Parser que respeita aspas (RFC 4180)
  function splitLine(line, sep){
    const fields = [];
    let cur = '', inQ = false;
    for(let i=0; i<line.length; i++){
      const c = line[i];
      if(c==='"'){
        if(inQ && line[i+1]==='"'){ cur+='"'; i++; } // aspas escapadas ""
        else inQ = !inQ;
      } else if(c===sep && !inQ){
        fields.push(cur); cur='';
      } else {
        cur += c;
      }
    }
    fields.push(cur);
    return fields;
  }

  function normalize(h){
    return h
      .replace(/^["']|["']$/g,'')
      .trim()
      .toLowerCase()
      .normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'')
      .replace(/ç/g,'c')
      .replace(/\s+/g,'_')
      .replace(/[^\w]/g,'');
  }

  function cleanVal(v){
    // Remove aspas externas, espaços e quebras de linha internas
    return v.replace(/^["']|["']$/g,'').replace(/\r?\n/g,' ').trim();
  }

  // Parser de linhas que respeita campos com quebra de linha interna (Alt+Enter)
  function splitLines(txt){
    const result=[];
    let cur='', inQ=false;
    for(let i=0;i<txt.length;i++){
      const c=txt[i];
      if(c==='"') inQ=!inQ;
      else if(!inQ && c==='\n'){
        if(cur.trim()) result.push(cur);
        cur=''; continue;
      }
      cur+=c;
    }
    if(cur.trim()) result.push(cur);
    return result;
  }
  const lines = splitLines(text);
  if(lines.length<2) return [];

  // Detecta separador olhando a primeira linha SEM quebrar por aspas
  const firstParsedComma = splitLine(lines[0], ',').length;
  const firstParsedSemi  = splitLine(lines[0], ';').length;
  const sep = firstParsedSemi > firstParsedComma ? ';' : ',';

  const headers = splitLine(lines[0], sep).map(normalize);

  return lines.slice(1).map(line=>{
    const vals = splitLine(line, sep).map(cleanVal);
    const obj = {};
    headers.forEach((h,i)=>{ obj[h] = vals[i]!==undefined ? vals[i] : ''; });
    return obj;
  }).filter(r => Object.values(r).some(v=>v!==''));
}

function toNum(v){
  if(v===null||v===undefined||v==='') return 0;
  // Remove prefixo R$, espaços, % e outros caracteres não numéricos do início/fim
  let s = String(v).trim()
    .replace(/^R\$\s*/i,'')   // remove "R$ " do início
    .replace(/%$/,'')           // remove "%" do fim
    .replace(/\s/g,'');        // remove espaços restantes
  if(!s || s==='-') return 0;
  // Formato BR com ponto como milhar e vírgula como decimal: 1.234,56
  if(/^\d{1,3}(\.\d{3})+(,\d+)?$/.test(s)) return parseFloat(s.replace(/\./g,'').replace(',','.')) || 0;
  // Formato com ponto como decimal: 1234.56
  if(/^\d+\.\d+$/.test(s)) return parseFloat(s) || 0;
  // Só remove vírgula decimal e converte
  return parseFloat(s.replace(',','.')) || 0;
}

function toDate(v){
  if(v===null||v===undefined||v==='') return null;
  const s = String(v).trim();
  if(!s) return null;
  // Padrão N1/N2/YYYY ou N1-N2-YYYY ou N1.N2.YYYY
  // Decide se é BR (D/M/Y) ou US (M/D/Y) olhando os números
  let m = s.match(/^(\d{1,2})[\/\-.](\d{1,2})[\/\-.](\d{4})/);
  if(m){
    const a=+m[1], b=+m[2], y=+m[3];
    let dia, mes;
    if(a>12 && b<=12){ dia=a; mes=b; }            // só pode ser BR
    else if(b>12 && a<=12){ mes=a; dia=b; }       // só pode ser US
    else if(a<=12 && b<=12){ mes=a; dia=b; }      // ambíguo → prioriza US (M/D/Y)
    else return null;                              // ambos > 12 = inválido
    return new Date(y, mes-1, dia);
  }
  // Ano de 2 dígitos
  m = s.match(/^(\d{1,2})[\/\-.](\d{1,2})[\/\-.](\d{2})(?!\d)/);
  if(m){
    const a=+m[1], b=+m[2], yy=+m[3];
    const y = yy<50 ? 2000+yy : 1900+yy;
    let dia, mes;
    if(a>12 && b<=12){ dia=a; mes=b; }
    else if(b>12 && a<=12){ mes=a; dia=b; }
    else if(a<=12 && b<=12){ mes=a; dia=b; }
    else return null;
    return new Date(y, mes-1, dia);
  }
  // 2026-05-26 ou 2026/05/26 (ISO sempre Y-M-D)
  m = s.match(/^(\d{4})[\/\-.](\d{2})[\/\-.](\d{2})/);
  if(m) return new Date(+m[1],+m[2]-1,+m[3]);
  // Serial number do Excel/Sheets
  const n = parseFloat(s.replace(',','.'));
  if(!isNaN(n) && n>40000 && n<60000){
    const d=new Date(1899,11,30); d.setDate(d.getDate()+Math.floor(n)); return d;
  }
  // Última tentativa: deixa o JS parsear
  const tryD = new Date(s);
  if(!isNaN(tryD.getTime()) && tryD.getFullYear()>2020 && tryD.getFullYear()<2100) return tryD;
  return null;
}

function fmt(d){ return d ? String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0')+'/'+String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') : ''; }
// Converte string 'YYYY-MM-DD' direto para 'DD/MM' sem timezone bug
function fmtISO(s){ if(!s) return ''; const p=s.split('-'); return p[2]+'/'+p[1]; }

// Funções globais de acesso a colunas (usadas em processData e nas funções de render)
function col(row, ...keys){ for(const k of keys){ if(row[k]!==undefined&&row[k]!=='') return row[k]; } return ''; }
function colNum(row,...keys){ return toNum(col(row,...keys)); }
function colPct(row,...keys){ let v=colNum(row,...keys); return (v>0&&v<1)?v*100:v; }
function fmtFull(d){ return d ? fmt(d)+'/'+d.getFullYear() : ''; }
function fv(v){ if(v>=1e6) return 'R$ '+(v/1e6).toFixed(2)+'M'; if(v>=1e3) return 'R$ '+(v/1e3).toFixed(1)+'K'; return 'R$ '+v.toFixed(0); }
function sc(s){ const i=VALID_SEGS.indexOf(s); return GS[i>=0?i%GS.length:0]||'#5ed9a0'; }
function lc(p){ return p<=10?'#2d6b4a':'#e05555'; }

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   FETCH — múltiplos métodos em cascata
   Tenta: pub/csv → gviz privado → gviz pubkey
   A planilha DEVE estar publicada: Arquivo → Publicar na web
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
const SHEET_PRIV_ID = '184Qxif7M1kDc84DvQC70W9TKHz4ToCejVvGFVHd1I44';

async function fetchSheet(gid, label){

  const ID = '184Qxif7M1kDc84DvQC70W9TKHz4ToCejVvGFVHd1I44';

  // Método 1: gviz/tq → formato CSV (mais confiável para planilhas publicadas)
  for(const cred of ['omit','include']){
    try {
      const url = `https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/${ID}/gviz/tq?tqx=out:csv&hl=en&gid=${gid}&t=${Date.now()}`;
      const r = await fetch(url, {cache:'no-store', credentials:cred});
      if(r.ok){
        const txt = await r.text();
        if(txt && txt.length > 20 && !txt.includes('<!DOCTYPE') && !txt.includes('<html')){
          console.log(`[${label}] ✓ gviz(${cred}) OK (${txt.length} bytes)`);
          return parseCsv(txt);
        }
      }
    } catch(e){ console.warn(`[${label}] gviz(${cred}):`, e.message); }
  }

  // Método 2: pub/csv direto
  for(const cred of ['omit','include']){
    try {
      const url = `https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/${ID}/export?format=csv&gid=${gid}&t=${Date.now()}`;
      const r = await fetch(url, {cache:'no-store', credentials:cred});
      if(r.ok){
        const txt = await r.text();
        if(txt && txt.length > 20 && !txt.includes('<!DOCTYPE') && !txt.includes('<html')){
          console.log(`[${label}] ✓ export(${cred}) OK (${txt.length} bytes)`);
          return parseCsv(txt);
        }
      }
    } catch(e){ console.warn(`[${label}] export(${cred}):`, e.message); }
  }

  console.error(`[${label}] todos falharam`);
  return [];
}

function setProgress(pct, msg){
  document.getElementById('load-bar').style.width = pct+'%';
  document.getElementById('load-msg').textContent = msg;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   LOAD ALL
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function loadAll(){
  const btn = document.getElementById('btn-refresh');
  btn && btn.classList.add('loading');
  document.getElementById('error-screen').style.display = 'none';
  if(!document.getElementById('app-header').style.display || document.getElementById('app-header').style.display==='none'){
    document.getElementById('loading-screen').style.display = 'flex';
  }

  setProgress(5, 'Carregando ruptura diária…');
  // Carrega TUDO em paralelo — muito mais rápido
  setProgress(10, 'Carregando dados…');
  const [
    rawDia, rawSeg, rawBridge, rawLojas, rawGeral,
    rawBr, rawDG, rawDS, rawDL, rawDF, rawForn,
    rawRupCd, rawRupCdSeg
  ] = await Promise.all([
    fetchSheet(GIDS.base_dia,    'base_dia'),
    fetchSheet(GIDS.base_seg,    'base_seg'),
    fetchSheet(GIDS.base_bridge, 'base_bridge'),
    fetchSheet(GIDS.base_lojas,  'base_lojas'),
    fetchSheet(GIDS.base_geral,  'base_geral'),
    fetchSheet(GIDS.bridge,      'bridge'),
    fetchSheet(GIDS.dde_geral,   'dde_geral'),
    fetchSheet(GIDS.dde_seg,     'dde_seg'),
    fetchSheet(GIDS.dde_loja,    'dde_loja'),
    fetchSheet(GIDS.dde_forn,    'dde_forn'),
    fetchSheet(GIDS.base_forn,   'base_forn'),
    fetchSheet(GIDS.rup_cd,      'rup_cd'),
    fetchSheet(GIDS.rup_cd_seg,  'rup_cd_seg'),
  ]);
  setProgress(85, 'Processando…');

  if(!rawDia.length && !rawDG.length && !rawSeg.length){
    document.getElementById('loading-screen').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('error-screen').style.display = 'flex';
    document.getElementById('err-msg').innerHTML = `
      Não foi possível carregar os dados da planilha.<br><br>
      <b>Verifique:</b><br>
      <b>1.</b> Abra a planilha → <b>Arquivo → Publicar na web</b><br>
      <b>2.</b> Escolha <b>Documento inteiro</b> → <b>Publicar</b><br>
      <b>3.</b> Aguarde 1 minuto e clique em <b>Atualizar</b><br><br>
      <span style="font-size:10px;opacity:.6">A planilha precisa estar publicada publicamente para o dashboard funcionar</span>
    `;
    btn && btn.classList.remove('loading');
    return;
  }

  // ── Salva os raws pra poder reprocessar quando trocar de data ──
  RAW.dia=rawDia; RAW.seg=rawSeg; RAW.forn=rawForn; RAW.geral=rawGeral; RAW.lojas=rawLojas;
  RAW.br=rawBr; RAW.dg=rawDG; RAW.ds=rawDS; RAW.dl=rawDL; RAW.df=rawDF; RAW.bridge=rawBridge; RAW.geral=rawGeral;
  RAW.rupCd=rawRupCd; RAW.rupCdSeg=rawRupCdSeg;

  // ── Process ──
  processData(rawDia, rawSeg, rawForn, rawLojas, rawBr, rawDG, rawDS, rawDL, rawDF, rawBridge, rawGeral, rawRupCd, rawRupCdSeg);

  // ── Popula o seletor de datas ──
  populateDatePicker();

  setProgress(100,'Pronto!');
  setTimeout(()=>{
    document.getElementById('loading-screen').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('app-sidebar').style.display   = 'flex';
    document.getElementById('app-main').style.display      = 'block';
    document.getElementById('ts').textContent = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('pt-BR');
  }, 200);

  renderAll();
  btn && btn.classList.remove('loading');
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   POPULATE DATE PICKER + HANDLE CHANGE
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
let DIAG_TEXT = '';

function populateDatePicker(){
  // col é função global

  const sources = [
    ['BASE DIA A DIA', RAW.dia],
    ['BASE LINHA GRAFICO', RAW.seg],
    ['BASE FORNECEDORES', RAW.forn],
    ['DDE GERAL', RAW.dg],
    ['DDE SEGMENTO', RAW.ds],
    ['DDE LOJA', RAW.dl],
    ['DDE FORNECEDOR', RAW.df],
  ];

  const datesSet = new Set();
  const unparsedSet = new Set();
  // Texto puro pra console + diagnóstico
  const txtLines = [];
  txtLines.push('🔍 DIAGNÓSTICO DAS DATAS NA BASE');
  txtLines.push('═'.repeat(60));

  sources.forEach(([name, raw])=>{
    if(!raw || !raw.length){
      txtLines.push(`❌ ${name}: VAZIA / NÃO CARREGOU`);
      txtLines.push('');
      return;
    }
    const cols = Object.keys(raw[0]||{});
    txtLines.push(`📋 ${name}: ${raw.length} linhas`);
    txtLines.push(`   Colunas: ${cols.join(', ')}`);
    // Pega as últimas 3 linhas e mostra valor cru da data
    const samples = raw.slice(-3);
    samples.forEach((r,i)=>{
      const rawDate = col(r,'data_estoque','data','date');
      const dt = toDate(rawDate);
      const status = dt ? '✓ '+dt.toISOString().slice(0,10) : '✗ NÃO PARSEOU';
      txtLines.push(`   linha ${raw.length-2+i}: data="${rawDate}" → ${status}`);
      if(rawDate && !dt) unparsedSet.add(rawDate);
    });
    txtLines.push('');
    // Junta todas as datas parseáveis no set
    raw.forEach(r=>{
      const rawDate = col(r,'data_estoque','data','date');
      const dt = toDate(rawDate);
      if(dt) datesSet.add(dt.toISOString().slice(0,10));
      else if(rawDate) unparsedSet.add(rawDate);
    });
  });

  if(unparsedSet.size){
    txtLines.push('⚠️ Datas que NÃO foram reconhecidas:');
    [...unparsedSet].slice(0,10).forEach(u=>txtLines.push(`   "${u}"`));
    txtLines.push('');
  }

  const sorted = [...datesSet].sort().reverse(); // mais recentes primeiro
  txtLines.push(`✅ Total de datas únicas reconhecidas: ${sorted.length}`);
  txtLines.push('');
  txtLines.push('🗓 Últimas 15 datas que vão pro dropdown:');
  sorted.slice(0,15).forEach(d=>{
    const [y,m,dd]=d.split('-');
    txtLines.push(`   ${dd}/${m}/${y}`);
  });

  // ── Tabela: para cada uma das últimas 5 datas, conta linhas em cada aba ──
  txtLines.push('');
  txtLines.push('📊 LINHAS POR DATA (últimas 5 datas):');
  txtLines.push('');
  const ultimas5 = sorted.slice(0,5);
  const headerCols = ['DIA A DIA','SEG','FORN','DDE GERAL','DDE SEG','DDE LOJA','DDE FORN'];
  txtLines.push('Data         | ' + headerCols.map(c=>c.padEnd(10)).join('| '));
  txtLines.push('─'.repeat(95));
  ultimas5.forEach(d=>{
    const counts = sources.map(([name,raw])=>{
      if(!raw) return 0;
      return raw.filter(r=>{
        const dt = toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data','date'));
        return dt && dt.toISOString().slice(0,10)===d;
      }).length;
    });
    const [y,m,dd]=d.split('-');
    txtLines.push(`${dd}/${m}/${y}  | ` + counts.map(c=>String(c).padEnd(10)).join('| '));
  });

  // ── Inspeção dos valores brutos (para detectar problema de % e R$) ──
  txtLines.push('');
  txtLines.push('🔎 VALORES BRUTOS DAS ÚLTIMAS 3 LINHAS DE CADA ABA:');
  txtLines.push('   (verifica se R$ e % estão sendo lidos corretamente)');
  txtLines.push('');
  function toNumLocal(v){
    if(v===null||v===undefined||v==='') return 0;
    let s = String(v).trim().replace(/^R\$\s*/i,'').replace(/%$/,'').replace(/\s/g,'');
    if(!s || s==='-') return 0;
    if(/^\d{1,3}(\.\d{3})+(,\d+)?$/.test(s)) return parseFloat(s.replace(/\./g,'').replace(',','.')) || 0;
    if(/^\d+\.\d+$/.test(s)) return parseFloat(s) || 0;
    return parseFloat(s.replace(',','.')) || 0;
  }
  sources.forEach(([name,raw])=>{
    if(!raw || !raw.length) return;
    txtLines.push(`📋 ${name}:`);
    raw.slice(-3).forEach((r,i)=>{
      const ln = raw.length-2+i;
      // Mostra todos os campos da linha
      const fields = Object.entries(r).map(([k,v])=>{
        const n = toNumLocal(v);
        return `${k}="${v}"${n!==0&&!isNaN(n)?` [num=${n}]`:''}`;
      }).join(' | ');
      txtLines.push(`   linha ${ln}: ${fields}`);
    });
    txtLines.push('');
  });

  DIAG_TEXT = txtLines.join('\n');
  console.log(DIAG_TEXT);

  // Mostra o botão de diagnóstico
  const dbtn = document.getElementById('diag-btn');
  if(dbtn) dbtn.style.display = 'block';
  // Atualiza o conteúdo do modal (caso já tenha sido aberto)
  const dc = document.getElementById('diag-content');
  if(dc) dc.textContent = DIAG_TEXT;

  const sel = document.getElementById('date-picker');
  if(!sel) return;
  const currentVal = LAST_DATE ? LAST_DATE.toISOString().slice(0,10) : '';
  sel.innerHTML = sorted.map(d=>{
    const [y,m,dd]=d.split('-');
    return `<option value="${d}" ${d===currentVal?'selected':''}>${dd}/${m}/${y}</option>`;
  }).join('');
  // Liga o onchange (uma vez só)
  if(!sel.dataset.bound){
    sel.dataset.bound = '1';
    sel.addEventListener('change', e=>{
      SELECTED_DATE = e.target.value;
      console.log('[TerraZoo] 🗓 Usuário escolheu data:', SELECTED_DATE);
      reprocessAndRender();
    });
  }
}

function reprocessAndRender(){
  console.log('[TerraZoo] 🔄 REPROCESSANDO para data:', SELECTED_DATE || '(auto)');

  // 1) Destrói TODOS os gráficos primeiro
  Object.keys(CHARTS).forEach(id=>destroyChart(id));

  // 2) Reseta estado
  Object.keys(D).forEach(k=>delete D[k]);

  // 3) Reprocessa os raws
  processData(RAW.dia, RAW.seg, RAW.forn, RAW.lojas, RAW.br, RAW.dg, RAW.ds, RAW.dl, RAW.df, RAW.bridge, RAW.geral, RAW.rupCd, RAW.rupCdSeg);

  // 4) Log: o que foi encontrado pra essa data?
  const lastStr = LAST_DATE ? LAST_DATE.toISOString().slice(0,10) : '?';
  console.log(`[TerraZoo] 📊 Dados encontrados para ${lastStr}:`);
  console.log(`   - SEGS_TODAY: ${(D.SEGS_TODAY||[]).length} segmentos`);
  console.log(`   - FORN:       ${(D.FORN||[]).length} fornecedores`);
  console.log(`   - DIAS_SEG:   ${(D.DIAS_SEG||[]).length} segmentos com DDE`);
  console.log(`   - DIAS_LOJA:  ${(D.DIAS_LOJA||[]).length} lojas com DDE`);
  console.log(`   - LOJAS:      ${(D.LOJAS||[]).length} lojas`);
  console.log(`   - SERIE (pontos até a data): ${(D.SERIE||[]).length}`);
  if(D.SERIE && D.SERIE.length){
    const last = D.SERIE[D.SERIE.length-1];
    console.log(`   - Último ponto da SERIE: ${last.d} | v=R$${Math.round(last.v).toLocaleString('pt-BR')} | p=${last.p.toFixed(2)}%`);
  }

  // 5) Reseta o controle de abas inicializadas (TUDO marca como não-inicializado)
  Object.keys(tabInit).forEach(k=>delete tabInit[k]);
  tabInit.ov = true; // ov é sempre re-renderizado por renderAll

  // 6) Renderiza a Visão Geral
  renderAll();

  // 7) Reinicializa TODAS as abas que foram inicializadas anteriormente
  // Lojas sempre re-inicializa (histórico por data em gid=1066519026)
  initLojas();
  tabInit['lj'] = true;

  // Reinicializa outras abas ativas
  const activeTab = document.querySelector('.tab.on');
  if(activeTab){
    const onclick = activeTab.getAttribute('onclick')||'';
    const m = onclick.match(/showTab\('([^']+)'/);
    if(m && m[1]!=='ov' && m[1]!=='lj'){
      if(m[1]==='fn') initForn();
      if(m[1]==='br') initBridge();
      if(m[1]==='rs') initRS();
      tabInit[m[1]] = true;
    }
  }
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   PROCESS DATA
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function processData(rawDia, rawSeg, rawForn, rawLojas, rawBr, rawDG, rawDS, rawDL, rawDF, rawBridge, rawGeral, rawRupCd, rawRupCdSeg){
  rawBridge = rawBridge||[]; rawGeral = rawGeral||[];

  // col, colNum, colPct são funções globais definidas acima

  // ── BASE DIA A DIA → SERIE
  // IMPORTANTE: só consideramos linhas onde EXISTE valor de ruptura (v>0)
  // Ignoramos linhas que tenham apenas % (sem valor R$), pois isso normalmente
  // representa dia incompleto/zerado.
  D.SERIE = rawDia.map(r=>({
    d: (() => { const dt=toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data','date')); return dt?dt.toISOString().slice(0,10):null; })(),
    v: colNum(r,'ruptura__preco_venda','ruptura_preco_venda','valor','v'),
    p: colPct(r,'av_ruptura__preco_venda','av_ruptura_preco_venda','percentual','pct','p')
  })).filter(x=>x.d).sort((a,b)=>a.d.localeCompare(b.d));

  // ── DDE_GERAL → DIAS_SERIE
  D.DIAS_SERIE = rawDG.map(r=>({
    d: (() => { const dt=toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data')); return dt?dt.toISOString().slice(0,10):null; })(),
    v: colNum(r,'dias_de_estoque_preco_venda','dde','dias_estoque','v')
  })).filter(x=>x.d&&x.v>0).sort((a,b)=>a.d.localeCompare(b.d));

  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // DEFINIÇÃO DA DATA DE REFERÊNCIA (LAST_DATE) — versão simples
  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // Regra: junta todas as datas que aparecem em qualquer aba,
  // ordena, e pega a (última - SKIP_LAST_N_DAYS).
  // Se DATE_OVERRIDE estiver setado, usa ele direto.
  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

  // Coleta totais $$$ por data — usa rawDia como fonte primária
  function totByDate(raw, valKeys){
    const m = {};
    raw.forEach(r=>{
      const dt = toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data'));
      if(!dt) return;
      const v = colNum(r, ...valKeys);
      if(v>0){
        const ds = dt.toISOString().slice(0,10);
        m[ds] = (m[ds]||0) + v;
      }
    });
    return m;
  }
  // Coleta datas de rawDia sem filtro de valor (pra não perder dias parciais)
  const totDia = {};
  rawDia.forEach(r=>{
    const dt = toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data','date'));
    if(!dt) return;
    const ds = dt.toISOString().slice(0,10);
    totDia[ds] = (totDia[ds]||0) + 1;
  });
  const totSeg  = totByDate(rawSeg, ['ruptura__preco_venda','ruptura_preco_venda','valor','v']);
  const totForn = {}, totDS = {}, totDL = {}, totDF = {};

  function pickReferenceDate(){
    // 1) SELECTED_DATE (escolha do usuário no dropdown) tem prioridade máxima
    if(SELECTED_DATE){
      console.log('[TerraZoo] 🗓 Usando data escolhida pelo usuário:', SELECTED_DATE);
      return SELECTED_DATE;
    }
    // 2) Override manual no código
    if(DATE_OVERRIDE){
      console.log('[TerraZoo] 🔒 DATE_OVERRIDE ativo:', DATE_OVERRIDE);
      return DATE_OVERRIDE;
    }

    // 2) Universo de datas: todas que aparecem em qualquer aba
    const all = new Set([
      ...Object.keys(totDia),   // BASE DIA A DIA — fonte primária
      ...Object.keys(totSeg),
      ...Object.keys(totForn),
      ...Object.keys(totDS),
      ...Object.keys(totDL),
      ...Object.keys(totDF),
      ...D.SERIE.map(x=>x.d),
      ...D.DIAS_SERIE.map(x=>x.d),
    ]);
    const sorted = [...all].sort();

    if(!sorted.length){
      console.warn('[TerraZoo] ⚠️ Nenhuma data encontrada na base!');
      return new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
    }

    // 3) Diagnóstico das últimas datas (vai pro console)
    console.log('[TerraZoo] 📊 Últimas datas encontradas na base:');
    sorted.slice(-7).forEach(ds=>{
      console.log(
        `  ${ds}  seg=R$${Math.round(totSeg[ds]||0).toLocaleString('pt-BR')} | ` +
        `forn=R$${Math.round(totForn[ds]||0).toLocaleString('pt-BR')} | ` +
        `dde_seg=${totDS[ds]?'sim':'não'} | dde_loja=${totDL[ds]?'sim':'não'} | dde_forn=${totDF[ds]?'sim':'não'}`
      );
    });

    // 4) Regra simples: pega a posição (length - 1 - SKIP_LAST_N_DAYS)
    //    Ex: se SKIP=1 e tem 80 datas, pega a [78] (penúltima)
    const targetIdx = sorted.length - 1 - SKIP_LAST_N_DAYS;
    if(targetIdx >= 0) return sorted[targetIdx];

    // Se SKIP for maior que a quantidade de datas, pega a primeira
    return sorted[0];
  }

  let lastStr = pickReferenceDate();
  const lastDt = new Date(lastStr+'T00:00:00');
  LAST_DATE = lastDt;
  console.log('[TerraZoo] ✅ Data de referência escolhida:', lastStr,
              `(SKIP_LAST_N_DAYS=${SKIP_LAST_N_DAYS})`);

  // Trunca a SERIE para não incluir datas posteriores ao LAST_DATE escolhido
  D.SERIE = D.SERIE.filter(x => x.d <= lastStr);
  D.DIAS_SERIE = D.DIAS_SERIE.filter(x => x.d <= lastStr);

  // ── RUPTURA COM CD (gid=686471442) → SERIE_CD
  rawRupCd = rawRupCd||[];
  D.SERIE_CD = rawRupCd.map(r=>({
    d: (()=>{ const dt=toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data')); return dt?dt.toISOString().slice(0,10):null; })(),
    v: colNum(r,'ruptura__preco_venda','ruptura_preco_venda','valor','v'),
    p: colPct(r,'av_ruptura__preco_venda','av_ruptura_preco_venda','percentual','pct','p')
  })).filter(x=>x.d&&x.v>0&&x.p>0).sort((a,b)=>a.d.localeCompare(b.d));
  D.SERIE_CD = D.SERIE_CD.filter(x=>x.d<=lastStr);
  // Último ponto da série c/ CD
  const lastCd = D.SERIE_CD[D.SERIE_CD.length-1]||{p:0,v:0};
  D.LAST_CD = lastCd;

  // ── RUPTURA COM CD POR SEGMENTO (gid=2125348850) → SEG_CD_TODAY + SEG_CD_SERIES
  rawRupCdSeg = rawRupCdSeg||[];
  D.SEG_CD_TODAY = {};
  D.SEG_CD_SERIES = {};
  rawRupCdSeg.forEach(r=>{
    const dt=toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data')); if(!dt) return;
    const ds=dt.toISOString().slice(0,10);
    if(ds>lastStr) return;
    let sg=col(r,'segmento','seg','nome_segmento'); if(!sg) return;
    sg=normSeg(sg); if(!VALID_SEGS.includes(sg)) return;
    const v=colNum(r,'ruptura__preco_venda','ruptura_preco_venda','valor','v');
    const p=colPct(r,'av_ruptura__preco_venda','av_ruptura_preco_venda','percentual','pct','p');
    if(!D.SEG_CD_SERIES[sg]) D.SEG_CD_SERIES[sg]=[];
    D.SEG_CD_SERIES[sg].push({d:ds,v,p});
    if(ds===lastStr) D.SEG_CD_TODAY[sg]={v,p};
  });
  VALID_SEGS.forEach(s=>{ if(D.SEG_CD_SERIES[s]) D.SEG_CD_SERIES[s].sort((a,b)=>a.d.localeCompare(b.d)); });

  // ── BASE LINHA GRAFICO → SEG_SERIES + SEGS_TODAY
  D.SEG_SERIES = {};
  const segByDate = {};
  rawSeg.forEach(r=>{
    const dt = toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data')); if(!dt) return;
    const ds = dt.toISOString().slice(0,10);
    if(ds > lastStr) return; // ignora datas posteriores ao corte
    let sg = col(r,'segmento','seg','nome_segmento'); if(!sg) return;
    // Normaliza usando mapa de aliases
    sg = normSeg(sg);
    if(!VALID_SEGS.includes(sg)) return;
    const v  = colNum(r,'ruptura__preco_venda','ruptura_preco_venda','valor','v');
    const p  = colPct(r,'av_ruptura__preco_venda','av_ruptura_preco_venda','percentual','pct','p');
    if(!D.SEG_SERIES[sg]) D.SEG_SERIES[sg]=[];
    D.SEG_SERIES[sg].push({d:ds,v,p});
    if(ds===lastStr){ if(!segByDate[sg]) segByDate[sg]={v:0,p:0}; segByDate[sg]={v,p}; }
  });
  // Complementa SEG_SERIES com dados da base_geral (gid=1263408591) por segmento/data
  // Agrupa rawGeral por data+segmento para preencher dias que faltam no rawSeg
  const geralByDateSeg = {};
  (rawGeral||[]).forEach(r=>{
    const dt=toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data')); if(!dt) return;
    const ds=dt.toISOString().slice(0,10);
    if(ds>lastStr) return;
    let sg=col(r,'segmento','seg','nome_segmento'); if(!sg) return;
    sg=normSeg(sg); if(!VALID_SEGS.includes(sg)) return;
    const v=colNum(r,'ruptura__preco_venda','ruptura_preco_venda','valor','v');
    const p=colPct(r,'av_ruptura__preco_venda','av_ruptura_preco_venda','percentual','pct');
    const key=ds+'|'+sg;
    if(!geralByDateSeg[key]) geralByDateSeg[key]={ds,sg,v:0,p:0};
    geralByDateSeg[key].v+=v;
    if(p>0) geralByDateSeg[key].p=p;
  });
  // Adiciona ao SEG_SERIES apenas os dias que ainda não estão lá
  Object.values(geralByDateSeg).forEach(({ds,sg,v,p})=>{
    if(!D.SEG_SERIES[sg]) D.SEG_SERIES[sg]=[];
    const exists=D.SEG_SERIES[sg].some(x=>x.d===ds);
    if(!exists && v>0) D.SEG_SERIES[sg].push({d:ds,v,p});
    // Atualiza segByDate se for o lastStr
    if(ds===lastStr && !segByDate[sg]) segByDate[sg]={v,p};
  });

  VALID_SEGS.forEach(s=>{ if(D.SEG_SERIES[s]) D.SEG_SERIES[s].sort((a,b)=>a.d.localeCompare(b.d)); });
  D.SEGS_TODAY = VALID_SEGS.map(s=>({s,v:segByDate[s]?.v||0,p:segByDate[s]?.p||0})).filter(x=>x.v>0||x.p>0);
  console.log('[TerraZoo] SEGS_TODAY:', D.SEGS_TODAY.map(s=>s.s+':'+s.p.toFixed(2)+'%').join(', '));
  // Log específico: quantos pontos por segmento e qual o último dia
  Object.entries(D.SEG_SERIES).forEach(([s,arr])=>{
    if(arr.length) console.log('[TerraZoo] SEG_SERIES', s, 'pts='+arr.length, 'ultimo='+arr[arr.length-1].d, 'lastStr='+lastStr);
  });

  // ── DDE_SEGEMNTO → DIAS_SEG + DIAS_SEG_SERIES (histórico por segmento)
  const ddsMap = {};
  D.DIAS_SEG_SERIES = {}; // {seg: [{d, v}]}
  rawDS.forEach(r=>{
    const dt=toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data')); if(!dt) return;
    const ds=dt.toISOString().slice(0,10);
    if(ds>lastStr) return;
    let sg=col(r,'segmento','seg'); if(!sg) return; sg=normSeg(sg); if(!VALID_SEGS.includes(sg)) return;
    const v=colNum(r,'dias_de_estoque_preco_venda','dde','v');
    if(!D.DIAS_SEG_SERIES[sg]) D.DIAS_SEG_SERIES[sg]=[];
    D.DIAS_SEG_SERIES[sg].push({d:ds,v});
    if(ds===lastStr) ddsMap[sg]=v;
  });
  VALID_SEGS.forEach(s=>{ if(D.DIAS_SEG_SERIES[s]) D.DIAS_SEG_SERIES[s].sort((a,b)=>a.d.localeCompare(b.d)); });
  D.DIAS_SEG = VALID_SEGS.map(s=>({s,d:ddsMap[s]||0})).filter(x=>x.d>0);

  // ── dde_loja → DIAS_LOJA
  const ddlMap = {};
  rawDL.forEach(r=>{
    const dt=toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data')); if(!dt) return;
    if(dt.toISOString().slice(0,10)!==lastStr) return;
    // Prioriza nome legível; fallback posição coluna C
    const keys=Object.keys(r);
    const colC=keys.length>=3?r[keys[2]]:'';
    const isNm=v=>v&&/[a-zA-ZÀ-ú]/.test(v)&&!/^\d+$/.test(String(v).trim());
    const nm=col(r,'nome_unidade_estoque','nome_loja')||(isNm(colC)?colC:null)||col(r,'unidade','loja');
    if(!nm) return;
    const d=colNum(r,'dias_de_estoque_preco_venda','dde','v');
    if(d>0) ddlMap[nm.trim()]=d;
  });
  D.DIAS_LOJA = Object.entries(ddlMap).map(([l,d])=>({l,d})).sort((a,b)=>b.d-a.d);

  // ── BASE FORNECEDORES → FORN (com segmento para filtro funcional)
  const fornMap={};
  (rawGeral&&rawGeral.length?rawGeral:rawForn).forEach(r=>{
    const dt=toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data')); if(!dt) return;
    if(dt.toISOString().slice(0,10)!==lastStr) return;
    const fn=col(r,'nome_fornecedor','fornecedor','forn'); if(!fn) return;
    const v=colNum(r,'ruptura__preco_venda','ruptura_preco_venda','valor','v');
    const p=colPct(r,'av_ruptura__preco_venda','av_ruptura_preco_venda','percentual','pct');
    let sg=col(r,'segmento','seg','nome_segmento')||''; if(sg) sg=normSeg(sg);
    if(v>0){
      if(!fornMap[fn]) fornMap[fn]={f:fn,v:0,p:0,seg:sg};
      fornMap[fn].v+=v;
      fornMap[fn].p=p; // último valor de % para o fornecedor
      if(!fornMap[fn].seg && sg) fornMap[fn].seg=sg;
    }
  });
  D.FORN = Object.values(fornMap).sort((a,b)=>b.v-a.v);
  D.TOP10_FORN = D.FORN.slice(0,10);

  // ── Índice FORN_BY_DATE: {data: {fornecedor: {v,p,seg}}}
  // Construído com base_forn (gid=1450706988) que tem histórico completo
  D.FORN_BY_DATE = {};
  const fbd_cutoff=(()=>{ const d=new Date(lastStr+'T00:00:00'); d.setDate(d.getDate()-4); return d.toISOString().slice(0,10); })();
  (rawForn&&rawForn.length?rawForn:rawGeral).forEach(r=>{
    const dt=toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data')); if(!dt) return;
    const ds=dt.toISOString().slice(0,10);
    if(ds<fbd_cutoff) return; // só últimos 4 dias
    const fn=col(r,'nome_fornecedor','fornecedor','forn'); if(!fn) return;
    const v=colNum(r,'ruptura__preco_venda','ruptura_preco_venda','valor','v');
    const p=colPct(r,'av_ruptura__preco_venda','av_ruptura_preco_venda','percentual','pct');
    const sg=normSeg(col(r,'segmento','seg','nome_segmento'));
    if(!D.FORN_BY_DATE[ds]) D.FORN_BY_DATE[ds]={};
    if(!D.FORN_BY_DATE[ds][fn]) D.FORN_BY_DATE[ds][fn]={v:0,p:0,seg:sg};
    D.FORN_BY_DATE[ds][fn].v+=v;
    if(p>0) D.FORN_BY_DATE[ds][fn].p=p;
  });
  console.log('[TerraZoo] FORN_BY_DATE datas:', Object.keys(D.FORN_BY_DATE).sort().slice(-5).join(', '));

  // ── dde_fornecedor → DDE_FORN_MAP
  D.DDE_FORN_MAP={};
  rawDF.forEach(r=>{
    const dt=toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data')); if(!dt) return;
    if(dt.toISOString().slice(0,10)!==lastStr) return;
    const fn=col(r,'nome_fornecedor','fornecedor'); if(!fn) return;
    const v=colNum(r,'dias_de_estoque_preco_venda','dde','v');
    if(v>0) D.DDE_FORN_MAP[fn]=v;
  });

  // ── BASE LOJAS (gid=1066519026) → LOJAS
  // A base tem: data_estoque | unidade | nome_unidade_estoque | ruptura | av_ruptura
  // Filtra pelo último dia disponível
  const EXCL_LOJAS = ['TERRAZOO CD','LYNKZ BR','RV PRODUÇÃO','LYNKZ IMPERATRI','CD '];
  const isNameVal = v => v && /[a-zA-ZÀ-ú]/.test(String(v)) && !/^\d+$/.test(String(v).trim());

  // Detecta última data disponível na base lojas (pode ser diferente de lastStr)
  const lojasDates = rawLojas.map(r=>{ const dt=toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data')); return dt?dt.toISOString().slice(0,10):null; }).filter(Boolean);
  const lojasUniq = [...new Set(lojasDates)].sort();
  // Usa a data de referência selecionada (lastStr já reflete SELECTED_DATE)
  // Procura a data mais próxima disponível na base lojas que não ultrapasse lastStr
  const lojasLastDate = lojasUniq.filter(d=>d<=lastStr).slice(-1)[0] || lastStr;
  console.log('[LOJAS] datas únicas:', lojasUniq.slice(-5).join(', '), '→ usando:', lojasLastDate, '(lastStr='+lastStr+')');

  // Constrói mapa unidade→nome (global para uso na bridge)
  unidadeToNome = {};
  rawLojas.forEach(r=>{
    const cod=col(r,'unidade'); if(!cod) return;
    const colKeys2=Object.keys(r);
    const colC2=colKeys2.length>=3?r[colKeys2[2]]:'';
    const nome=col(r,'nome_unidade_estoque','nome_loja')||(colC2&&isNameVal(colC2)?String(colC2).trim():null);
    if(nome) unidadeToNome[String(cod).trim()]=nome;
  });

  const lojaMap={}, lojaSegs={}, lojaItems={};
