  if(rawLojas.length) console.log('[LOJAS] amostra data raw:', col(rawLojas[rawLojas.length-1],'data_estoque','data'), '→ toDate:', toDate(col(rawLojas[rawLojas.length-1],'data_estoque','data'))?.toISOString()?.slice(0,10));
  rawLojas.forEach(r=>{
    const dt=toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data'));
    // Se tem data filtra; aceita tanto lastStr quanto lojasLastDate
    if(dt && dt.toISOString().slice(0,10)!==lojasLastDate) return;

    // Pega nome: tenta coluna "nome_unidade_estoque" primeiro, depois posição C
    const colKeys = Object.keys(r);
    const colC = colKeys.length >= 3 ? r[colKeys[2]] : '';
    const lojaNome = col(r,'nome_unidade_estoque','nome_loja','nome_unidade')
                  || (isNameVal(colC) ? String(colC).trim() : null)
                  || col(r,'unidade','loja');
    if(!lojaNome) return;
    if(EXCL_LOJAS.some(ex=>String(lojaNome).toUpperCase().startsWith(ex))) return;

    const seg  = col(r,'segmento','seg');
    const prod = col(r,'produto','nome_produto','item','descricao');
    const v    = colNum(r,'ruptura__preco_venda','ruptura_preco_venda','valor','v');
    const p    = colPct(r,'av_ruptura__preco_venda','av_ruptura_preco_venda','percentual','pct');
    if(!lojaMap[lojaNome]) lojaMap[lojaNome]={v:0,p:0,cnt:0};
    lojaMap[lojaNome].v += v;
    if(p>0) lojaMap[lojaNome].p = p;
    lojaMap[lojaNome].cnt++;
    if(seg){ if(!lojaSegs[lojaNome]) lojaSegs[lojaNome]={}; lojaSegs[lojaNome][seg]=(lojaSegs[lojaNome][seg]||0)+v; }
    if(prod && v>0){ if(!lojaItems[lojaNome]) lojaItems[lojaNome]=[]; lojaItems[lojaNome].push({nome:prod,val:v,pct:p,seg:seg||''}); }
  });
  for(const l in lojaItems) lojaItems[l].sort((a,b)=>b.val-a.val);

  const totalRup = D.SERIE.length ? D.SERIE[D.SERIE.length-1].v : 1;
  const totalPct = D.SERIE.length ? D.SERIE[D.SERIE.length-1].p : 13;

  D.LOJAS = Object.entries(lojaMap)
    .filter(([l,{v}])=>v>0)
    .map(([l,{v,p}])=>({ l, v, p }))
    .sort((a,b)=>b.v-a.v);

  D.LOJA_SEGS  = lojaSegs;
  D.LOJA_ITEMS = lojaItems;

  // D.BRIDGE será calculado após BRIDGE_ITEMS (mais abaixo)

  // ── BRIDGE
  D.BRIDGE = {pct:totalPct, val:totalRup, statuses:[
    {label:'Sit. Crítica c/ Pedido', v:totalRup*.400, pp:totalPct*.400, col:'#ff4444'},
    {label:'Sit. Crítica s/ Pedido', v:totalRup*.214, pp:totalPct*.214, col:'#ff9999'},
    {label:'CD Insuficiente',        v:totalRup*.102, pp:totalPct*.102, col:'#f4a030'},
    {label:'CD Atende Loja',         v:totalRup*.252, pp:totalPct*.252, col:'#34c97a'},
    {label:'Estoque Negativo',       v:totalRup*.032, pp:totalPct*.032, col:'#ffd166'},
  ]};

  // Check for bridge sheet data  
  if(rawBr.length>1){
    const brLast = rawBr[rawBr.length-1];
    const keys = Object.keys(brLast);
    if(keys.length>2){
      // Try to extract bridge data from the last row
      D.BRIDGE.rawBridge = brLast;
    }
  }

  // ── CRIT per seg (for ruptura segmentos tab)
  D.CRIT={};
  VALID_SEGS.forEach(seg=>{
    const st=D.SEGS_TODAY.find(x=>x.s===seg)||{v:0,p:0};
    const topF=D.FORN.filter(f=>f.seg===seg).slice(0,10);
    const items=(D.SEG_SERIES[seg]||[]);
    D.CRIT[seg]={
      v:st.v, p:st.p,
      pp:parseFloat((st.p*0.614).toFixed(4)),
      total_v:parseFloat((st.v*0.614).toFixed(2)),
      f:topF,
      ti:null
    };
  });

  // ── BASE LOJAS-BRIDGE → BRIDGE_ITEMS (itens críticos com loja/seg)
  D.BRIDGE_ITEMS=[];
  D.SEG_ITEMS={};
  const bridgeSrc = rawBridge.length ? rawBridge : [];
  // Filter bridge by lastStr if it has dates, otherwise use all
  const bridgeHasDate = bridgeSrc.some(r=>toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data'))!==null);
  const bridgeFiltered = bridgeHasDate
    ? bridgeSrc.filter(r=>{ const dt=toDate(col(r,'data_estoque','data')); return dt&&dt.toISOString().slice(0,10)===lastStr; })
    : bridgeSrc;

  bridgeFiltered.forEach(r=>{
    const v  = colNum(r,'ruptura__preco_venda','ruptura_preco_venda','valor','v','ruptura_valor');
    if(v<=0) return;
    // Exclui filiais 300 e 203 (não monitoradas)
    const ljCodBr = col(r,'unidade','b');
    if(ljCodBr==='300'||ljCodBr==='203') return;
    const nm  = col(r,'produto','nome_produto','descricao','item','cod_produto');
    const ljCod2=col(r,'unidade'); const lj=col(r,'nome_unidade_estoque','loja','nome_loja')||unidadeToNome[String(ljCod2).trim()]||ljCod2||'—';
    let sg  = col(r,'segmento','seg','nome_segmento'); if(sg) sg=normSeg(sg);
    const fn  = col(r,'nome_fornecedor','fornecedor');
    const pct = colPct(r,'av_ruptura__preco_venda','av_ruptura_preco_venda','percentual','pct');
    // Lê Status V2 (coluna O) — pode vir truncado se célula tem quebra de linha
    let st = col(r,'status_v2','status','situacao','status_ruptura');
    // Se status termina com " -" ou similar, tenta concatenar com campo adjacente
    if(st && st.trim().endsWith('-')){
      // Pega todas as chaves e encontra a próxima após status_v2
      const allKeys = Object.keys(r);
      const stKey = allKeys.find(k=>r[k]===st);
      if(stKey){
        const stIdx = allKeys.indexOf(stKey);
        const nextVal = stIdx>=0 && allKeys[stIdx+1] ? r[allKeys[stIdx+1]] : '';
        if(nextVal) st = (st+' '+nextVal).trim();
      }
    }
    // Coluna F da base_bridge — lê por posição se nome não encontrado
    const allKeysB = Object.keys(r);
    let codProd = col(r,'cod_produto','codigo','cod','sku','codigo_produto','f');
    if(!codProd && allKeysB.length>=6) codProd = r[allKeysB[5]]||'';
    D.BRIDGE_ITEMS.push({nome:nm||'—',cod:codProd||'',loja:lj||'—',seg:sg||'—',forn:fn||'—',v,pct,status:st});
  });
  D.BRIDGE_ITEMS.sort((a,b)=>b.v-a.v);
  const stUniq2=[...new Set(D.BRIDGE_ITEMS.map(it=>(it.status||'').toUpperCase().trim()))].filter(Boolean);
  console.log('[BRIDGE] Status únicos lidos:', stUniq2.join(' | '));
  console.log('[BRIDGE] Total itens com v>0:', D.BRIDGE_ITEMS.length);

  // ── Recalcula D.BRIDGE com dados reais de BRIDGE_ITEMS (5 status)
  const brDefsG=[
    {label:'Sit. Crítica c/ Pedido', keys:['PEDIDO PENDENTE','SITUAÇÃO CRÍTICA - PEDIDO','SITUACAO CRITICA - PEDIDO','- PEDIDO'], col:'#ff4444'},
    {label:'Sit. Crítica s/ Pedido', keys:['SEM PEDIDO','SITUAÇÃO CRÍTICA - SEM','SITUACAO CRITICA - SEM','- SEM'],              col:'#ff9999'},
    {label:'CD Insuficiente',        keys:['CD INSUFICIENTE','INSUFICIENTE P/','CD INSUF'],                            col:'#f4a030'},
    {label:'CD Atende Loja',         keys:['CD ATENDE LOJA','CD ATENDE','ATENDE LOJA','PRENOTA'],                      col:'#34c97a'},
    {label:'Estoque Negativo',       keys:['ESTOQUE NEGATIVO','NEGATIVO'],                                             col:'#ffd166'},
  ];
  function mSt(stUp,keys){ return keys.some(k=>stUp.includes(k)); }
  const brSums={};
  D.BRIDGE_ITEMS.forEach(it=>{
    const stUp=(it.status||'').toUpperCase().trim();
    if(!stUp||stUp==='SEM RUPTURA') return;
    for(const d of brDefsG){ if(mSt(stUp,d.keys)){ brSums[d.label]=(brSums[d.label]||0)+it.v; break; } }
  });
  const brVTot=Object.values(brSums).reduce((a,v)=>a+v,0);
  if(brVTot>0){
    // D.LOJAS já foi processado — usa seu total como valor real (sem 300/203)
    const lojasTotalVal = D.LOJAS.reduce((a,l)=>a+l.v,0)||totalRup;
    const statusOrder = ['Sit. Crítica c/ Pedido','Sit. Crítica s/ Pedido','CD Insuficiente','CD Atende Loja','Estoque Negativo'];
    const brDefsColors = {'Sit. Crítica c/ Pedido':'#ff4444','Sit. Crítica s/ Pedido':'#ff9999','CD Insuficiente':'#f4a030','CD Atende Loja':'#34c97a','Estoque Negativo':'#ffd166'};
    // Base de valor: última linha de gid=1475484739 (D.SERIE)
    const baseValGeral = totalRup; // vem de D.SERIE[last].v
    let ppAc=0, vAc=0;
    const brSts=statusOrder.map((label,i)=>{
      const sv=brSums[label]||0;
      const prop=brVTot>0?sv/brVTot:0;
      let vReal, pp;
      if(i<statusOrder.length-1){
        vReal=Math.round(prop*baseValGeral*100)/100;
        pp=Math.round(prop*totalPct*100)/100;
        ppAc+=pp; vAc+=vReal;
      } else {
        vReal=Math.round((baseValGeral-vAc)*100)/100;
        pp=Math.round((totalPct-ppAc)*100)/100;
      }
      return {label,col:brDefsColors[label]||'#888',v:Math.max(0,vReal),pp:Math.max(0,pp)};
    });
    D.BRIDGE={pct:totalPct,val:totalRup,statuses:brSts};
    console.log('[TerraZoo] BRIDGE val='+fv(lojasTotalVal)+' statuses='+brSts.map(s=>s.label+':'+fv(s.v)).join(', '));
  }

  // TOP_ITEM = item mais crítico do dia
  D.TOP_ITEM = D.BRIDGE_ITEMS[0]||null;

  // SEG_ITEMS: top 10 itens por segmento usando bridge
  VALID_SEGS.forEach(seg=>{
    const items = D.BRIDGE_ITEMS.filter(it=>it.seg===seg).slice(0,10);
    D.SEG_ITEMS[seg] = items.length
      ? items
      : Object.values(lojaItems).flatMap(arr=>arr.filter(it=>it.seg===seg))
          .sort((a,b)=>b.val-a.val).slice(0,10)
          .map(it=>({nome:it.nome,loja:'—',seg:it.seg,forn:'—',v:it.val,pct:it.pct,status:''}));
    if(D.SEG_ITEMS[seg].length&&D.CRIT[seg]) D.CRIT[seg].ti={p:D.SEG_ITEMS[seg][0].nome,v:D.SEG_ITEMS[seg][0].v,pp:0};
  });

  // LOJA_ITEMS_BRIDGE: top 10 itens por loja usando bridge
  D.LOJA_ITEMS_BRIDGE={};
  D.BRIDGE_ITEMS.forEach(it=>{
    if(!D.LOJA_ITEMS_BRIDGE[it.loja]) D.LOJA_ITEMS_BRIDGE[it.loja]=[];
    if(D.LOJA_ITEMS_BRIDGE[it.loja].length<10) D.LOJA_ITEMS_BRIDGE[it.loja].push(it);
  });

  // ── BRIDGE_BY_LOJA: {loja: {pct, val, statuses[]}}
  // Para cada loja, calcula os pp de cada status baseado nos itens da bridge
  const brStatusDef=[
    {label:'Sit. Crítica c/ Pedido', keys:['PEDIDO PENDENTE','SITUAÇÃO CRÍTICA - PEDIDO','SITUACAO CRITICA - PEDIDO','- PEDIDO'], col:'#ff4444'},
    {label:'Sit. Crítica s/ Pedido', keys:['SEM PEDIDO','SITUAÇÃO CRÍTICA - SEM','SITUACAO CRITICA - SEM','- SEM'],              col:'#ff9999'},
    {label:'CD Insuficiente',        keys:['CD INSUFICIENTE','INSUFICIENTE P/','CD INSUF'],                            col:'#f4a030'},
    {label:'CD Atende Loja',         keys:['CD ATENDE LOJA','CD ATENDE','ATENDE LOJA','PRENOTA'],                      col:'#34c97a'},
    {label:'Estoque Negativo',       keys:['ESTOQUE NEGATIVO','NEGATIVO'],                                             col:'#ffd166'},
  ];
  function matchBrStatus(stUp, keys){ return keys.some(k=>stUp.includes(k)); }
  D.BRIDGE_BY_LOJA={};
  // Agrupa por loja
  const lojaMap2={};
  D.BRIDGE_ITEMS.forEach(it=>{
    const lj=it.loja; if(!lj||lj==='—') return;
    if(!lojaMap2[lj]) lojaMap2[lj]={val:0,statuses:{}};
    lojaMap2[lj].val+=it.v;
    const stUp=(it.status||'').toUpperCase().trim();
    let cat=null;
    for(const d of brStatusDef){ if(matchBrStatus(stUp,d.keys)){ cat=d.label; break; } }
    if(cat){
      if(!lojaMap2[lj].statuses[cat]) lojaMap2[lj].statuses[cat]=0;
      lojaMap2[lj].statuses[cat]+=it.v;
    }
  });
  // Cruza com D.LOJAS para pegar o % e valor de ruptura de cada loja
  Object.entries(lojaMap2).forEach(([lj,data])=>{
    const lojaInfo=D.LOJAS.find(l=>l.l===lj)||{p:0,v:0};
    const pct=lojaInfo.p||0;   // % ruptura da loja (gid=1066519026)
    const val=lojaInfo.v||data.val; // valor total ruptura da loja (gid=1066519026)
    const valBridge=data.val||1;   // total bridge da loja (sem 300/203)

    // Proporção de cada status = sv / valBridge
    // pp = proporção × pct  (garante que soma = pct)
    // Último status fecha o resto para evitar erro de arredondamento
    let ppAcum=0;
    const statuses=brStatusDef.map((d,i)=>{
      const sv=data.statuses[d.label]||0;
      const prop=valBridge>0?sv/valBridge:0; // proporção do status no total bridge
      let pp;
      if(i<brStatusDef.length-1){
        pp=Math.round(prop*pct*100)/100;
        ppAcum+=pp;
      } else {
        pp=Math.round((pct-ppAcum)*100)/100;
      }
      // Valor proporcional ao val da loja (gid=1066519026) — fecha exato
      const vReal = i<brStatusDef.length-1
        ? Math.round(prop*val*100)/100
        : null; // calculado depois
      return {label:d.label,col:d.col,v:vReal||0,pp:Math.max(0,pp)};
    });
    // Fecha valor do último status: val - soma dos outros (exato)
    const somaV=statuses.slice(0,-1).reduce((a,s)=>a+s.v,0);
    statuses[statuses.length-1].v=Math.round((val-somaV)*100)/100;
    // Verifica: soma dos pp deve = pct
    const soma=statuses.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.pp,0);
    console.log('[BRIDGE_LOJA]',lj,'pct='+pct.toFixed(2),'soma_pp='+soma.toFixed(2));
    D.BRIDGE_BY_LOJA[lj]={pct,val,statuses};
  });
  console.log('[TerraZoo] BRIDGE_BY_LOJA lojas:', Object.keys(D.BRIDGE_BY_LOJA).length);

  // ── BRIDGE_BY_SEG: {seg: {pct, val, statuses[]}}
  // Mesma lógica da bridge por loja mas filtrando por segmento
  const segMap3={};
  D.BRIDGE_ITEMS.forEach(it=>{
    const sg=it.seg; if(!sg||sg==='—') return;
    if(!segMap3[sg]) segMap3[sg]={val:0,statuses:{}};
    segMap3[sg].val+=it.v;
    const stUp=(it.status||'').toUpperCase().trim();
    let cat=null;
    for(const d of brStatusDef){ if(matchBrStatus(stUp,d.keys)){ cat=d.label; break; } }
    if(cat){
      if(!segMap3[sg].statuses[cat]) segMap3[sg].statuses[cat]=0;
      segMap3[sg].statuses[cat]+=it.v;
    }
  });
  D.BRIDGE_BY_SEG={};
  Object.entries(segMap3).forEach(([sg,data])=>{
    const segInfo=D.SEGS_TODAY.find(s=>s.s===sg)||{p:0,v:0};
    const pct=segInfo.p||0;
    const val=segInfo.v||data.val;
    const valBridge=data.val||1;
    let ppAcum=0;
    const statuses=brStatusDef.map((d,i)=>{
      const sv=data.statuses[d.label]||0;
      const prop=valBridge>0?sv/valBridge:0;
      let pp;
      if(i<brStatusDef.length-1){ pp=Math.round(prop*pct*100)/100; ppAcum+=pp; }
      else { pp=Math.round((pct-ppAcum)*100)/100; }
      const vReal=i<brStatusDef.length-1?Math.round(prop*val*100)/100:null;
      return {label:d.label,col:d.col,v:vReal||0,pp:Math.max(0,pp)};
    });
    const somaV=statuses.slice(0,-1).reduce((a,s)=>a+s.v,0);
    statuses[statuses.length-1].v=Math.round((val-somaV)*100)/100;
    D.BRIDGE_BY_SEG[sg]={pct,val,statuses};
  });
  console.log('[TerraZoo] BRIDGE_BY_SEG segs:', Object.keys(D.BRIDGE_BY_SEG).length);

  console.log('[TerraZoo] Data loaded. Last date:', lastStr, '| SERIE pts:', D.SERIE.length, '| LOJAS:', D.LOJAS.length);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   RENDER ALL
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function renderAll(){
  renderOV();
}

/* ── VISÃO GERAL ── */
const BO={responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,
  plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{backgroundColor:'rgba(240,244,240,.97)',borderColor:'#c5d9c5',borderWidth:1,titleColor:'#1a2e22',bodyColor:'rgba(26,46,34,.7)',padding:10,cornerRadius:8}},
  scales:{x:{grid:{color:'rgba(45,107,74,.06)'},ticks:{color:'rgba(26,46,34,.45)'}},y:{grid:{color:'rgba(45,107,74,.06)'},ticks:{color:'rgba(26,46,34,.45)'}}}};

function renderOV(){
  const last = D.SERIE[D.SERIE.length-1]||{p:0,v:0,d:''};
  const prev = D.SERIE[D.SERIE.length-2]||last;
  const dde  = D.DIAS_SERIE[D.DIAS_SERIE.length-1]||{v:0};
  const delta= last.p - prev.p;

  const lastCdKpi = D.LAST_CD||{p:0,v:0};
  // Card % Ruptura — s/ CD (maior) + c/ CD (menor)
  document.getElementById('k-pct').innerHTML =
    `<span style="font-size:26px;font-weight:700;color:#ff9999">${last.p.toFixed(2)}%</span>
     <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);margin-top:4px">s/ CD</div>
     ${lastCdKpi.p>0?`<div style="font-size:17px;font-weight:600;color:#ffcc88;margin-top:2px">${lastCdKpi.p.toFixed(2)}% <span style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55)">c/ CD</span></div>`:''}`;
  document.getElementById('k-pct-s').textContent= fmtFull(LAST_DATE)+' · Meta: 10%';
  const tag = document.getElementById('k-pct-t');
  if(last.p<=10){tag.className='kpi-tag tag-g';tag.textContent='✓ Dentro da meta';}
  else{tag.className='kpi-tag tag-r';tag.textContent='▲ +'+(last.p-10).toFixed(2)+'pp acima meta';}
  // Card Valor em Ruptura — s/ CD (maior) + c/ CD (menor)
  document.getElementById('k-val').innerHTML =
    `<span style="font-size:26px;font-weight:700;color:#ffd166">${fv(last.v)}</span>
     <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);margin-top:4px">s/ CD</div>
     ${lastCdKpi.v>0?`<div style="font-size:17px;font-weight:600;color:#ffcc88;margin-top:2px">${fv(lastCdKpi.v)} <span style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55)">c/ CD</span></div>`:''}`;
  document.getElementById('k-val-s').textContent= fmtFull(LAST_DATE);
  document.getElementById('k-dde').textContent  = dde.v.toFixed(1)+'d';

  // Top 3 fornecedores por DDE (dde_fornecedor, último dia)
  const ddeEl = document.getElementById('k-dde-forn');
  if(ddeEl && D.DDE_FORN_MAP){
    const fornTop3 = Object.entries(D.DDE_FORN_MAP)
      .filter(([,v])=>v>0 && v<=400)
      .sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,3);
    ddeEl.innerHTML = fornTop3.length ? fornTop3.map(([nome,ddeV])=>`
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:2px 0;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)">
        <span style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;max-width:115px">${nome.split(' ').slice(0,2).join(' ')}</span>
        <span style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:#7dd4a0;font-weight:600;flex-shrink:0">${Math.round(ddeV)}d</span>
      </div>`).join('') : '';
  }

  document.getElementById('top-item-date').textContent = fmtFull(LAST_DATE);
  const ti = D.TOP_ITEM;
  document.getElementById('top-item-body').innerHTML = ti
    ? `<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px">
        <div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2px">Produto</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#1a2e22;line-height:1.3">${ti.nome}</div></div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap">
          <div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2px">Loja</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#ffd166">${ti.loja}</div></div>
          <div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2px">Seg.</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:${sc(ti.seg)}">${ti.seg.replace('PET ','')}</div></div>
        </div>
        <div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2px">Valor Ruptura</div>
          <div style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:#ff6b6b">${fv(ti.v)}</div></div>
        ${ti.status?`<div style="font-size:9px;color:#ff9999;font-weight:600">${ti.status}</div>`:''}
      </div>`
    : '<div style="color:var(--muted);font-size:11px">Nenhum item crítico encontrado</div>';

  const top3Segs = [...D.SEGS_TODAY].sort((a,b)=>b.p-a.p).slice(0,3);
  const segFontSizes = [16, 13, 11];
  const segPctSizes = [18, 14, 12];
  document.getElementById('k-seg').innerHTML = top3Segs.map((sg,i)=>`
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:${i>0?'4px 0 0':'0'};${i>0?'border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)':''}">
      <span style="font-size:${segFontSizes[i]}px;font-weight:700;color:#ffd166;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:120px">${sg.s.replace('PET ','')}</span>
      <span style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:${segPctSizes[i]}px;font-weight:700;color:#ff9999;flex-shrink:0">${sg.p.toFixed(1)}%</span>
    </div>`).join('');

  // Seg bars
  const mx = Math.max(...D.SEGS_TODAY.map(s=>s.v),1);
  document.getElementById('ov-seg-bars').innerHTML = D.SEGS_TODAY.sort((a,b)=>b.p-a.p).map((s,i)=>{
    const m=SEG_METAS[s.s]||10; const over=s.p>m;
    const cdSeg = D.SEG_CD_TODAY[s.s]||{v:0,p:0};
    return `<div style="padding:4px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(45,107,74,.07)">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;gap:4px">
        <span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#1a2e22;letter-spacing:.2px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap">${s.s.replace('PET ','')}</span>
        <span style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:${over?'#e05555':'#2d6b4a'};flex-shrink:0">${s.p.toFixed(1)}%</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-top:1px">
        <span style="font-size:8px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.4)">${fv(s.v)}</span>
        ${cdSeg.p>0?`<span style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.35)">c/ ${cdSeg.p.toFixed(1)}%</span>`:''}
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');

  // Serie chart — últimos 30 dias, estilo Ruptura Segmentos (barras + linhas)
  const ld = LAST_DATE;
  const ldStr = ld.toISOString().slice(0,10);
  const cutoff30 = new Date(ld); cutoff30.setDate(cutoff30.getDate()-(OV_DAYS-1));
  const cut30Str = cutoff30.toISOString().slice(0,10);
  const data = D.SERIE.filter(x=>x.d>=cut30Str&&x.d<=ldStr);
  const diasMap={}; D.DIAS_SERIE.forEach(x=>diasMap[x.d]=x.v);
  document.getElementById('ov-sl').textContent = fmt(new Date(data[0]?.d||ld))+'–'+fmt(ld);
  destroyChart('cSerie');
  const ctx=document.getElementById('cSerie').getContext('2d');

  // Plugin labels OV — por label em vez de índice fixo (datasets dinâmicos)
  const ovLabelPlugin = {
    id:'ovLabels',
    afterDatasetsDraw(chart){
      const ctx=chart.ctx;
      chart.data.datasets.forEach((ds,di)=>{
        const lbl=ds.label||'';
        const meta=chart.getDatasetMeta(di);
        if(meta.hidden) return;
        if(ds.type==='bar'||(!ds.type&&chart.config.type==='bar')){
          // Barras — valor vertical dentro
          const isCCD = lbl.includes('c/ CD');
          meta.data.forEach((bar,i)=>{
            const val=ds.data[i]; if(!val||val<=0) return;
            const barH=bar.base-bar.y; if(barH<12) return;
            ctx.save();
            ctx.translate(bar.x, bar.y+barH/2); ctx.rotate(-Math.PI/2);
            ctx.font='bold 12px DM Mono,monospace';
            ctx.fillStyle=isCCD?'#ffffff':'#3a4a3e';
            ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='middle';
            ctx.fillText(fv(val),0,0); ctx.restore();
          });
        } else if(ds.type==='line'){
          if(lbl.includes('% s/')||lbl.includes('% c/')){
            // Linhas % — label nos pontos
            const col=ds.borderColor||(lbl.includes('% s/')? '#7dd4a0':'#2d6b4a');
            const above=lbl.includes('% s/');
            meta.data.forEach((pt,i)=>{
              const val=ds.data[i]; if(val==null) return;
              ctx.save(); ctx.font='bold 10px Inter,sans-serif'; ctx.fillStyle=col;
              ctx.textAlign='center';
              if(above){ ctx.textBaseline='bottom'; ctx.fillText(val.toFixed(1)+'%',pt.x,pt.y-4); }
              else      { ctx.textBaseline='top';    ctx.fillText(val.toFixed(1)+'%',pt.x,pt.y+3); }
              ctx.restore();
            });
          } else if(lbl==='DDE'){
            // DDE — label abaixo dos pontos
            meta.data.forEach((pt,i)=>{
              const val=ds.data[i]; if(val==null) return;
              ctx.save(); ctx.font='bold 10px DM Mono,monospace'; ctx.fillStyle='#7a8b80';
              ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='top';
              ctx.fillText(Math.round(val)+'d',pt.x,pt.y+3); ctx.restore();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    }
  };

  // Mapa de dados c/ CD alinhados às mesmas datas
  const cdMap={}; D.SERIE_CD.forEach(x=>{ cdMap[x.d]={v:x.v,p:x.p}; });
  const dataCdV = data.map(x=>cdMap[x.d]?.v||null);
  const dataCdP = data.map(x=>cdMap[x.d]?.p||null);

  // Modo: s/CD, c/CD ou ambos
  const ovBoth = OV_CD_SCD && OV_CD_CCD;
  const ovScaleMax = ovBoth
    ? (()=>{const mx=Math.max(...data.map(x=>x.v),1); return mx*1.4;})()
    : (()=>{const vals=OV_CD_SCD?data.map(x=>x.v):dataCdV.filter(Boolean); const mx=Math.max(...vals,1); return mx*1.1;})();

  const ovDatasets = [];
  if(OV_CD_SCD) ovDatasets.push(
    {type:'bar',  label:'Valor s/ CD', data:data.map(x=>x.v), backgroundColor:'#7dd4a060',borderColor:'#7dd4a0',borderWidth:1,yAxisID:'yV',order:4},
    {type:'line', label:'% s/ CD',    data:data.map(x=>x.p), borderColor:'#7dd4a0',backgroundColor:'#7dd4a015',fill:false,borderWidth:2.5,pointRadius:5,pointBackgroundColor:'#7dd4a0',tension:.3,yAxisID:'yP',order:1}
  );
  if(OV_CD_CCD) ovDatasets.push(
    {type:'bar',  label:'Valor c/ CD', data:dataCdV, backgroundColor:'#4a9e6e',borderColor:'#2d6b4a',borderWidth:2,yAxisID:'yV',order:5},
    {type:'line', label:'% c/ CD',    data:dataCdP, borderColor:'#2d6b4a',backgroundColor:'transparent',fill:false,borderWidth:2,pointRadius:4,pointBackgroundColor:'#2d6b4a',tension:.3,yAxisID:'yP',order:2,borderDash:[4,2]}
  );
  ovDatasets.push(
    {type:'line', label:'Meta 10%', data:data.map(()=>10), borderColor:'rgba(255,255,255,.25)',borderWidth:1.5,borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0,fill:false,yAxisID:'yP',order:3},
    {type:'line', label:'DDE',      data:data.map(x=>diasMap[x.d]||null),borderColor:'#7a8b80',backgroundColor:'transparent',borderWidth:1.5,borderDash:[3,3],pointRadius:3,pointBackgroundColor:'#7a8b80',tension:.3,yAxisID:'yD',order:3}
  );

  CHARTS.cSerie=new Chart(ctx,{type:'bar',data:{labels:data.map(x=>fmtISO(x.d)),datasets:ovDatasets},plugins:[ovLabelPlugin],options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,interaction:{mode:'index',intersect:false},
    plugins:{legend:{display:true,position:'top',labels:{color:'rgba(26,46,34,.6)',usePointStyle:true,padding:10,font:{size:9}}},
      tooltip:{...BO.plugins.tooltip,callbacks:{label:c=>{
        const lbl=c.dataset.label||'';
        if(lbl.includes('Valor s/')) return c.raw? ` Valor s/ CD: ${fv(c.raw)}`:null;
        if(lbl.includes('Valor c/')) return c.raw? ` Valor c/ CD: ${fv(c.raw)}`:null;
        if(lbl.includes('% s/'))    return c.raw? ` % s/ CD: ${c.raw.toFixed(2)}%`:null;
        if(lbl.includes('% c/'))    return c.raw? ` % c/ CD: ${c.raw.toFixed(2)}%`:null;
        if(lbl==='DDE'&&c.raw!=null) return ` DDE: ${Math.round(c.raw)}d`;
        return null;
      }}}},
    scales:{
      x:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{color:'rgba(26,46,34,.4)',font:{size:9},maxTicksLimit:20}},
      yP:{position:'left',grid:{color:'rgba(45,107,74,.06)'},ticks:{color:'rgba(58,127,213,.6)',callback:v=>v+'%',font:{size:9}},min:0},
      yV:{position:'right',grid:{display:false},ticks:{display:false},max:ovScaleMax},
      yD:{position:'right',display:false}
    }}});
}

/* ── SEGMENTOS ── */
function initSeg(){
  document.getElementById('sg-fps').innerHTML = VALID_SEGS.map((s,i)=>
    `<button class="fp${i===0?' on':''}" onclick="selSg('${s}',this)">${s.replace('PET ','')}</button>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('sg-tbl').innerHTML = D.SEGS_TODAY.map((s,i)=>{
    const m=SEG_METAS[s.s]||10;
    return `<tr><td class="rk">${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}</td>
      <td style="font-weight:600;font-size:10px;color:${sc(s.s)}">${s.s}</td>
      <td style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;color:#f4a85d">${fv(s.v)}</td>
      <td style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;color:${s.p>m?'#ff6b6b':'#5ed9a0'}">${s.p.toFixed(2)}%</td></tr>`;
  }).join('');
  destroyChart('cSgPct');
  CHARTS.cSgPct=new Chart(document.getElementById('cSgPct'),{type:'bar',data:{
    labels:D.SEGS_TODAY.map(s=>s.s.replace('PET ','')),
    datasets:[{data:D.SEGS_TODAY.map(s=>s.p),backgroundColor:D.SEGS_TODAY.map(s=>s.p>(SEG_METAS[s.s]||10)?'#ff6b6b':sc(s.s)),borderRadius:5}]
  },options:{...BO,plugins:{...BO.plugins,tooltip:{...BO.plugins.tooltip,callbacks:{label:c=>`${c.raw.toFixed(2)}%`}}},scales:{x:{grid:{display:false}},y:{...BO.scales.y,ticks:{callback:v=>v+'%'}}}}});
  destroyChart('cSgVal');
  CHARTS.cSgVal=new Chart(document.getElementById('cSgVal'),{type:'bar',data:{
    labels:D.SEGS_TODAY.map(s=>s.s.replace('PET ','')),
    datasets:[{data:D.SEGS_TODAY.map(s=>s.v),backgroundColor:D.SEGS_TODAY.map(s=>sc(s.s)),borderRadius:5}]
  },options:{...BO,plugins:{...BO.plugins,tooltip:{...BO.plugins.tooltip,callbacks:{label:c=>fv(c.raw)}}},scales:{x:{grid:{display:false}},y:{...BO.scales.y,ticks:{callback:v=>fv(v)}}}}});
  CUR_SG = VALID_SEGS[0];
  selSg(CUR_SG, document.querySelector('#sg-fps .fp'));
}

function selSg(seg,btn){
  document.querySelectorAll('#sg-fps .fp').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));
  if(btn) btn.classList.add('on');
  CUR_SG=seg;
  document.getElementById('sg-sel').textContent=seg;
  const s=D.SEGS_TODAY.find(x=>x.s===seg)||{v:0,p:0};
  const m=SEG_METAS[seg]||10; const ok=s.p<=m;
  document.getElementById('si-nm').textContent=seg;
  document.getElementById('si-vl').textContent=fv(s.v);
  document.getElementById('si-pt').textContent=s.p.toFixed(2)+'%';
  document.getElementById('si-st').textContent=ok?'Dentro da meta':'Acima da meta';
  document.getElementById('si-st').className='stb '+(ok?'stb-ok':'stb-crit');
  const data=D.SEG_SERIES[seg]||[];
  destroyChart('cSgLine');
  const ctx=document.getElementById('cSgLine').getContext('2d');
  const c=sc(seg); const gg=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,260); gg.addColorStop(0,c+'40'); gg.addColorStop(1,c+'00');
  CHARTS.cSgLine=new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels:data.map(d=>d.d.slice(5)),datasets:[
    {type:'line',label:'Valor R$',data:data.map(d=>d.v),borderColor:c,backgroundColor:gg,fill:true,tension:.4,borderWidth:2.5,pointRadius:3,yAxisID:'yV'},
    {type:'line',label:'% Ruptura',data:data.map(d=>d.p),borderColor:'#ffd166',fill:false,tension:.4,borderWidth:1.5,borderDash:[4,3],pointRadius:2,yAxisID:'yP'}
  ]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,
    plugins:{legend:{display:true,position:'top',labels:{color:'rgba(26,46,34,.6)',usePointStyle:true,padding:10,font:{size:10}}},
      tooltip:{...BO.plugins.tooltip,callbacks:{label:c=>c.datasetIndex===0?fv(c.raw):`${c.raw.toFixed(2)}%`}}},
    scales:{x:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{maxTicksLimit:10,color:'rgba(26,46,34,.4)'}},
      yV:{position:'left',grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.04)'},ticks:{color:'#3a4a3e',callback:v=>fv(v)}},
      yP:{position:'right',grid:{display:false},ticks:{color:'#ffd16699',callback:v=>v+'%'}}}}});
}

/* ── LOJAS ── */
function initLojas(){
  const ls=D.LOJAS.filter(l=>!['TERRAZOO CD','LYNKZ BR','RV PRODUÇÃO'].includes(l.l));

  // ── Lojas dentro da meta (≤10%) ──
  const lojasOk = ls.filter(l=>l.p<=10).sort((a,b)=>a.p-b.p);
  document.getElementById('lj-meta-cnt').textContent = lojasOk.length+' lojas';
  document.getElementById('lj-meta-list').innerHTML = lojasOk.length
    ? lojasOk.map(l=>`
        <div style="background:rgba(94,217,160,.08);border:1px solid rgba(94,217,160,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;min-width:130px;flex:1;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s"
             onclick="openDrawer('${l.l.replace(/'/g,"\'")}')"
             onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(94,217,160,.18)'"
             onmouseout="this.style.background='rgba(94,217,160,.08)'">
          <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#3a4a3e;margin-bottom:3px">${l.l}</div>
          <div style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#5ed9a0">${l.p.toFixed(1)}%</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:#3a4a3e;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;margin-top:1px">${fv(l.v)}</div>
        </div>`).join('')
    : '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">Nenhuma loja dentro da meta hoje</div>';

  // ── Top 5 situação crítica (maior %) — mesmo layout que lojas na meta ──
  const lojasCrit = [...ls].filter(l=>l.p>10).sort((a,b)=>b.p-a.p);
  document.getElementById('lj-crit-cnt').textContent = lojasCrit.length+' lojas';
  document.getElementById('lj-crit-list').innerHTML = lojasCrit.length
    ? lojasCrit.map(l=>`
        <div style="background:rgba(255,107,107,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,107,107,.25);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;min-width:130px;flex:1;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s"
             onclick="openDrawer('${l.l.replace(/'/g,"\'")}')"
             onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(255,107,107,.15)'"
             onmouseout="this.style.background='rgba(255,107,107,.08)'">
          <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#3a4a3e;margin-bottom:3px">${l.l}</div>
          <div style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#ff6b6b">${l.p.toFixed(1)}%</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:#3a4a3e;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;margin-top:1px">${fv(l.v)}</div>
        </div>`).join('')
    : '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">Nenhuma loja acima da meta</div>';
  document.getElementById('lj-tbl').innerHTML=ls.map((l,i)=>{
    const dde=D.DIAS_LOJA.find(d=>d.l===l.l);
    const st=l.p<=10?'<span class="stb stb-ok">✓ OK</span>':l.p<=15?'<span class="stb" style="background:rgba(255,209,102,.1);color:#ffd166">⚠ Atenção</span>':l.p<=25?'<span class="stb" style="background:rgba(244,168,93,.12);color:#f4a85d">🔶 Alerta</span>':'<span class="stb stb-crit">🔴 Crítico</span>';
    return `<tr onclick="openDrawer('${l.l.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}') " style="cursor:pointer">
      <td class="rk">${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}</td><td style="font-weight:600">${l.l}</td>
      <td style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;color:${lc(l.p)};font-weight:700">${l.p.toFixed(2)}%</td>
      <td style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;color:#f4a85d">${fv(l.v)}</td>
      <td style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;color:#ffd166">${dde?dde.d.toFixed(0)+'d':'—'}</td>
      <td>${st}</td></tr>`;
  }).join('');
}

/* ── DRAWER ── */
// Drawer state
let _drawerLoja = '';
let _drawerAllItems = [];
let _drawerSegs = [];

function openDrawer(loja){
  _drawerLoja = loja;
  const lj = D.LOJAS.find(l=>l.l===loja)||{v:0,p:0};
  const dde = D.DIAS_LOJA.find(d=>d.l===loja);

  // Get ALL bridge items for this loja
  const EXCL=['203','300'];
  const allBridgeForLoja = D.BRIDGE_ITEMS
    ? D.BRIDGE_ITEMS.filter(it=>it.loja===loja && !EXCL.includes(String(it.loja))).sort((a,b)=>b.v-a.v)
    : [];
  const lojaFallbackItems = (D.LOJA_ITEMS&&D.LOJA_ITEMS[loja]||[]).slice(0,10).map(it=>({nome:it.nome,loja,seg:it.seg,v:it.val,pct:it.pct,cod:''}));
  _drawerAllItems = allBridgeForLoja.length ? allBridgeForLoja : lojaFallbackItems;

  // Build segs: prefer LOJA_SEGS, fallback to aggregating from BRIDGE_ITEMS
  let segMap = D.LOJA_SEGS&&D.LOJA_SEGS[loja] ? {...D.LOJA_SEGS[loja]} : {};
  if(!Object.keys(segMap).length && allBridgeForLoja.length){
    allBridgeForLoja.forEach(it=>{ if(it.seg) segMap[it.seg]=(segMap[it.seg]||0)+(it.v||0); });
  }
  // Also supplement from LOJA_ITEMS if still empty
  if(!Object.keys(segMap).length && D.LOJA_ITEMS&&D.LOJA_ITEMS[loja]){
    D.LOJA_ITEMS[loja].forEach(it=>{ if(it.seg) segMap[it.seg]=(segMap[it.seg]||0)+(it.val||0); });
  }
  const segs = Object.entries(segMap).filter(([,v])=>v>0).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]);
  _drawerSegs = segs;

  document.getElementById('drawer-name').textContent=loja;
  document.getElementById('drawer-kpis').innerHTML=`
    <div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase">% Ruptura</div>
      <div style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:${lc(lj.p)}">${lj.p.toFixed(1)}%</div></div>
    <div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase">Valor</div>
      <div style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#f4a85d">${fv(lj.v)}</div></div>
    <div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase">DDE</div>
      <div style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#ffd166">${dde?dde.d.toFixed(0)+'d':'—'}</div></div>`;

  // Render segments — clickable
  if(segs.length){
    document.getElementById('drawer-segs').innerHTML = segs.map(([sg,sv],i)=>`
      <div id="dseg-${i}" onclick="drawerFilterSeg('${sg.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}')"
        style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:4px;transition:background .15s;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04)"
        onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(45,107,74,.15)'"
        onmouseout="window._drawerActiveSeg!=='${sg.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}' && (this.style.background='rgba(255,255,255,.04)')">
        <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:${sc(sg)}">${sg.replace('PET ','')}</span>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
          <div style="width:60px;height:4px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:2px">
            <div style="height:4px;border-radius:2px;width:${segs[0][1]>0?(sv/segs[0][1]*100).toFixed(0):0}%;background:${sc(sg)}"></div>
          </div>
          <span style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:#f4a85d;min-width:44px;text-align:right">${fv(sv)}</span>
          <span style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.4)">›</span>
        </div>
      </div>`).join('');
  } else {
    document.getElementById('drawer-segs').innerHTML='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">Sem dados de segmento</div>';
  }

  document.getElementById('drawer-seg-reset').style.display='none';
  window._drawerActiveSeg = null;
  renderDrawerItems(null);

  document.getElementById('loja-drawer').classList.add('open');
  document.getElementById('drawer-overlay').classList.add('open');
}

function drawerFilterSeg(seg){
  window._drawerActiveSeg = seg;
  const resetBtn = document.getElementById('drawer-seg-reset');

  // Update segment highlight
  const segs = _drawerSegs;
  segs.forEach(([sg],i)=>{
    const el = document.getElementById('dseg-'+i);
    if(!el) return;
    if(seg === null || sg === seg){
      el.style.background = sg===seg ? 'rgba(45,107,74,.2)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,.04)';
      el.style.opacity = '1';
    } else {
      el.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,.02)';
      el.style.opacity = '0.45';
    }
  });

  if(seg){
    resetBtn.style.display='inline-block';
    document.getElementById('drawer-items-title').textContent = `Top 10 — ${seg.replace('PET ','')}`;
  } else {
    resetBtn.style.display='none';
    document.getElementById('drawer-items-title').textContent = 'Top 10 Itens';
    // Reset all opacities
    segs.forEach(([sg],i)=>{
      const el=document.getElementById('dseg-'+i);
      if(el){el.style.opacity='1';el.style.background='rgba(255,255,255,.04)';}
    });
  }

  renderDrawerItems(seg);
}

function renderDrawerItems(seg){
  const EXCL=['203','300'];
  let items = _drawerAllItems.filter(it=>!EXCL.includes(String(it.loja)));
  if(seg) items = items.filter(it=>{
    const s=(it.seg||'').toUpperCase();
    const t=seg.toUpperCase();
    return s===t || s.replace('PET ','')===t.replace('PET ','') || t.replace('PET ','')===s.replace('PET ','');
  });
  items = items.slice(0,10);

  if(!items.length){
    document.getElementById('drawer-items').innerHTML='<div style="padding:12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">Nenhum item encontrado</div>';
    return;
  }
  document.getElementById('drawer-items').innerHTML = items.map((it,i)=>{
    const nomeLimpo=(it.nome||'').replace(/^\d{2,4}\s*-\s*/,'');
    const codProduto=it.cod && !/^\d{1,3}$/.test(it.cod.toString().trim()) ? it.cod : '';
    return `
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:7px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;flex:1;min-width:0">
        <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace">${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}</span>
        <div style="min-width:0">
          <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:220px;color:#3a4a3e">${codProduto?codProduto+' - ':''}<span>${nomeLimpo}</span></div>
          <div style="font-size:8px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.55);margin-top:1px">${it.seg||'—'}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <span style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.7);flex-shrink:0;margin-left:8px">${fv(it.v||it.val||0)}</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function closeDrawer(){ document.getElementById('loja-drawer').classList.remove('open'); document.getElementById('drawer-overlay').classList.remove('open'); }

function showLojaItems(loja, btn){
  // Destaca o card clicado
  document.querySelectorAll('.lc').forEach(c=>c.style.outline='none');
  if(btn) btn.style.outline='2px solid #5ed9a0';
  const items = (D.LOJA_ITEMS_BRIDGE&&D.LOJA_ITEMS_BRIDGE[loja])
    || (D.LOJA_ITEMS&&D.LOJA_ITEMS[loja]||[]).slice(0,10).map(it=>({nome:it.nome,loja,seg:it.seg,v:it.val}));
  const titleEl = document.getElementById('loja-items-title');
  const listEl  = document.getElementById('loja-items-list');
  if(!titleEl||!listEl) return;
  titleEl.textContent = `Top 10 Itens em Ruptura — ${loja}`;
  if(!items.length){
    listEl.innerHTML='<div style="color:var(--muted);padding:12px;font-size:11px">Sem itens encontrados para esta loja</div>';
    return;
  }
  listEl.innerHTML = items.map((it,i)=>`
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:8px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex:1;min-width:0">
        <span style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);flex-shrink:0">${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}</span>
        <div style="min-width:0">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:300px">${it.nome||'—'}</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:${sc(it.seg||'')};margin-top:1px">${it.seg||''}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <span style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:#f4a85d;flex-shrink:0;margin-left:12px;font-weight:600">${fv(it.v||it.val||0)}</span>
    </div>`).join('');
}

/* ── FORNECEDORES ── */
function initForn(){
  const segs=['TODOS',...VALID_SEGS];
  document.getElementById('fn-fps').innerHTML=segs.map((s,i)=>
    `<button class="fp${i===0?' on':''}" onclick="selFn('${s}',this)">${s==='TODOS'?'TODOS':s.replace('PET ','')}</button>`).join('');
  selFn('TODOS',document.querySelector('#fn-fps .fp'));
  // Top 3 piores — será atualizado pelo selFn
  renderTop3(D.FORN.slice(0,3));
}
function renderTop3(list){
  document.getElementById('fn-top3').innerHTML = list.slice(0,3).map((f,i)=>{
    const rank=['1º','2º','3º'][i];
    return `<div class="card" style="border-top:3px solid #ff6b6b">
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.5);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px">Maior Ruptura · ${rank}</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#ff6b6b;margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1.3">${f.f.length>32?f.f.slice(0,32)+'…':f.f}</div>
      <div style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:#f4a85d">${fv(f.v)}</div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px">${f.p.toFixed(2)}% · ${(f.seg||'—').replace('PET ','')}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function selFn(seg,btn){
  document.querySelectorAll('#fn-fps .fp').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));
  if(btn) btn.classList.add('on');
  document.getElementById('fn-sel').textContent=seg==='TODOS'?'Geral':seg;
  const data=seg==='TODOS'?D.FORN:D.FORN.filter(f=>f.seg===seg||(f.seg&&f.seg.includes(seg.replace('PET ',''))));
  const top=data.slice(0,10);
  // Atualiza top3 com fornecedores do segmento selecionado
  renderTop3(data);
  destroyChart('cForn');
  CHARTS.cForn=new Chart(document.getElementById('cForn'),{type:'bar',data:{
    labels:top.map(f=>f.f.length>22?f.f.slice(0,22)+'…':f.f),
    datasets:[{data:top.map(f=>f.v),backgroundColor:top.map((_,i)=>i<3?'#ffd166':'rgba(94,217,160,.5)'),borderRadius:4}]
  },options:{...BO,indexAxis:'y',plugins:{...BO.plugins,tooltip:{...BO.plugins.tooltip,callbacks:{label:c=>`${fv(c.raw)} · ${top[c.dataIndex].p.toFixed(2)}%`}}},
    scales:{x:{grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.04)'},ticks:{callback:v=>fv(v)}},y:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{font:{size:9}}}}}});
  document.getElementById('fn-tbl').innerHTML=top.map((f,i)=>{
    const dde=D.DDE_FORN_MAP[f.f];
    return `<tr style="${i<3?'background:rgba(255,209,102,.04)':''}">
      <td class="rk" style="${i<3?'color:#ffd166;font-weight:700':''}">${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}</td>
      <td style="font-weight:${i<3?700:400};font-size:10px">${f.f.length>30?f.f.slice(0,30)+'…':f.f}</td>
      <td style="font-size:9px;color:${sc(f.seg||'')};">${(f.seg||'').replace('PET ','')}</td>
      <td style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;color:#f4a85d">${fv(f.v)}</td>
      <td style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;color:${f.p>30?'#ff6b6b':f.p>15?'#ffd166':'#5ed9a0'};font-weight:${i<3?700:400}">${f.p.toFixed(2)}%</td>
      <td style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;color:var(--muted)">${dde?dde.toFixed(0)+'d':'—'}</td></tr>`;
  }).join('');
}

/* ── BRIDGE ── */
let BR_MODE = 'geral'; // 'geral', 'seg', 'loja'

function initBridge(){
  // Popula pills de segmentos
  const segs=Object.keys(D.BRIDGE_BY_SEG).sort();
  document.getElementById('br-seg-pills').innerHTML=segs.map(s=>
    `<button class="fp" onclick="selBridge('seg:${s.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}',this)" style="font-size:8px">${s.replace('PET ','')}</button>`
  ).join('');
  // Popula pills de lojas
  const lojas=Object.keys(D.BRIDGE_BY_LOJA).sort();
  document.getElementById('br-loja-pills').innerHTML=lojas.map(l=>
    `<button class="fp" onclick="selBridge('loja:${l.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}',this)" style="font-size:8px">${l}</button>`
  ).join('');
  selBridgeMode('geral');
}

function selBridgeMode(mode){
  BR_MODE=mode;
  // Atualiza botões de modo
  document.getElementById('br-btn-geral').classList.toggle('on', mode==='geral');
  document.getElementById('br-btn-seg').classList.toggle('on', mode==='seg');
  document.getElementById('br-btn-loja').classList.toggle('on', mode==='loja');
  // Mostra/oculta pills
  document.getElementById('br-seg-pills').style.display = mode==='seg'?'flex':'none';
  document.getElementById('br-loja-pills').style.display = mode==='loja'?'flex':'none';
  if(mode==='geral'){
    selBridge('geral', null);
  } else if(mode==='seg'){
    // Seleciona primeiro segmento
    const firstSeg=Object.keys(D.BRIDGE_BY_SEG).sort()[0];
    if(firstSeg){
      selBridge('seg:'+firstSeg, document.querySelector('#br-seg-pills .fp'));
    }
  } else if(mode==='loja'){
    // Seleciona primeira loja
    const firstLoja=Object.keys(D.BRIDGE_BY_LOJA).sort()[0];
    if(firstLoja){
      selBridge('loja:'+firstLoja, document.querySelector('#br-loja-pills .fp'));
    }
  }
}

function selBridge(key, btn){
  // Remove seleção das pills ativas do modo atual
  document.querySelectorAll('#br-seg-pills .fp, #br-loja-pills .fp').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));
  if(btn) btn.classList.add('on');

  let br, brLabel;
  if(key==='geral'){
    br=D.BRIDGE; brLabel='Geral';
  } else if(key.startsWith('seg:')){
    const sg=key.slice(4);
    const lb=D.BRIDGE_BY_SEG[sg]; if(!lb) return;
    br={pct:lb.pct,val:lb.val,statuses:lb.statuses}; brLabel=sg.replace('PET ','');
  } else {
    const loja=key.startsWith('loja:')?key.slice(5):key;
    const lb=D.BRIDGE_BY_LOJA[loja]; if(!lb) return;
    br={pct:lb.pct,val:lb.val,statuses:lb.statuses}; brLabel=loja;
  }
  const loja = key.startsWith('loja:')?key.slice(5):(key==='geral'?'geral':null);
  const brOrig=D.BRIDGE; // sempre usa meta geral de 10%
  document.getElementById('br-sub').textContent=`${brLabel} · Ruptura ${br.pct.toFixed(2)}% · ${fmtFull(LAST_DATE)}`;
  document.getElementById('br-cards').innerHTML=br.statuses.map(s=>`
    <div class="bsc" style="--bc:${s.col}">
      <div class="bsc-lbl" style="color:${s.col}">${s.label}</div>
      <div class="bsc-val" style="color:#ffffff">${fv(s.v)}</div>
      <div class="bsc-pct">${s.pp.toFixed(2)}pp · ${br.pct>0?(s.pp/br.pct*100).toFixed(1):'0'}%</div>
    </div>`).join('');

  const metaPct=10;
  const rupAtual=br.pct||0;
  const wfLabels=['Meta 10%',...br.statuses.map(s=>s.label),'Ruptura Atual'];
  const wfColors=['#2d6b4a',...br.statuses.map(s=>s.col),'#ff6b6b'];
  let run=metaPct; const wfBase=[0]; const wfBar=[metaPct];
  br.statuses.forEach(s=>{ wfBase.push(run); wfBar.push(s.pp); run+=s.pp; });
  wfBase.push(0); wfBar.push(rupAtual);
  const wfLabelsRef=wfLabels; const wfColorsRef=wfColors;
  destroyChart('cBridge');
  CHARTS.cBridge=new Chart(document.getElementById('cBridge'),{type:'bar',data:{
    labels:wfLabelsRef,
    datasets:[
      {data:wfBase,backgroundColor:'rgba(0,0,0,0)',borderWidth:0,stack:'w'},
      {data:wfBar,backgroundColor:wfColorsRef,borderRadius:5,stack:'w'}
    ]
  },options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,
    animation:{onComplete:function(){
      const chart=this; const ctx=chart.ctx;
      ctx.save(); ctx.font='bold 11px Inter,sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='bottom';
      wfBar.forEach((val,i)=>{
        const metaDs=chart.getDatasetMeta(1); const bar=metaDs.data[i];
        if(!bar||val<=0) return;
        const x=bar.x; const y=bar.y-4;
        ctx.fillStyle='#1a2e22';
        if(i===0){ ctx.fillStyle='#ffffff'; ctx.fillText('Meta: '+val.toFixed(1)+'%', x, y); ctx.fillStyle='#1a2e22'; }
        else if(i===wfBar.length-1){
          ctx.fillText(val.toFixed(2)+'%', x, y);
          ctx.font='10px DM Mono,monospace'; ctx.fillStyle='#5a6b60';
          ctx.fillText(fv(br.val), x, y+14);
          ctx.font='bold 11px Inter,sans-serif';
        } else {
          const si=i-1;
          if(si>=0&&si<br.statuses.length){
            ctx.fillText(br.statuses[si].pp.toFixed(2)+'pp', x, y);
            ctx.font='10px DM Mono,monospace'; ctx.fillStyle='#5a6b60';
            ctx.fillText(fv(br.statuses[si].v), x, y+14);
            ctx.font='bold 11px Inter,sans-serif';
          }
        }
      });
      ctx.restore();
    }},
    onClick:(evt,els)=>{
      if(!els.length||els[0].datasetIndex!==1) return;
      const i=els[0].index;
      // i=0 é Meta, último é Ruptura Atual — status são i=1..N-1
      if(i>0 && i<wfBar.length-1){
        const statusIdx=i-1;
        const statusLabel=br.statuses[statusIdx]?.label;
        if(statusLabel){
          const lojaParam = key==='geral'?'geral':(key.startsWith('loja:')?key.slice(5):null);
          const segParam  = key.startsWith('seg:')?key.slice(4):null;
          showBridgeDrilldown(statusLabel, lojaParam, segParam);
        }
      }
    },
    plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{...BO.plugins.tooltip,filter:i=>i.datasetIndex===1,
      callbacks:{title:c=>c[0].label,label:c=>c.dataIndex>0&&c.dataIndex<wfBar.length-1?[` ${br.statuses[c.dataIndex-1].pp.toFixed(2)}pp`,` ${fv(br.statuses[c.dataIndex-1].v)}`,` Clique para ver itens`]:[]}}},
    scales:{x:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{color:'#3a4a3e',font:{size:9}}},
      y:{grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.05)'},stacked:true,ticks:{color:'#3a4a3e',callback:v=>v.toFixed(1)+'%'}}}}});
}


/* ── BRIDGE DRILL-DOWN ── */
function showBridgeDrilldown(statusLabel, loja, seg){
  // Filtra BRIDGE_ITEMS pelo status e loja (se especificada)
  let items = D.BRIDGE_ITEMS.filter(it=>{
    const stUp=(it.status||'').toUpperCase().trim();
    // Verifica status
    const brDefsCheck=[
      {label:'Sit. Crítica c/ Pedido', keys:['PEDIDO PENDENTE','SITUAÇÃO CRÍTICA - PEDIDO','SITUACAO CRITICA - PEDIDO','- PEDIDO']},
      {label:'Sit. Crítica s/ Pedido', keys:['SEM PEDIDO','SITUAÇÃO CRÍTICA - SEM','SITUACAO CRITICA - SEM','- SEM']},
      {label:'CD Insuficiente',        keys:['CD INSUFICIENTE','INSUFICIENTE P/','CD INSUF']},
      {label:'CD Atende Loja',         keys:['CD ATENDE LOJA','CD ATENDE','ATENDE LOJA','PRENOTA']},
      {label:'Estoque Negativo',       keys:['ESTOQUE NEGATIVO','NEGATIVO']},
    ];
    let cat=null;
    for(const d of brDefsCheck){ if(d.keys.some(k=>stUp.includes(k))){ cat=d.label; break; } }
    if(cat!==statusLabel) return false;
    // Filtra por loja se especificada
    if(loja && loja!=='geral') return it.loja===loja;
    // Filtra por segmento se especificado
    if(seg) return it.seg===seg;
    return true;
  });
  // Ordena por valor decrescente
  items.sort((a,b)=>b.v-a.v);

  const panel=document.getElementById('br-drilldown');
  const title=document.getElementById('br-dd-title');
  const list=document.getElementById('br-dd-list');

  title.textContent=(loja&&loja!=='geral'?loja+' · ':'')+statusLabel+' ('+items.length+' itens)';

  if(!items.length){
    list.innerHTML='<div style="color:var(--muted);padding:12px;font-size:11px">Nenhum item encontrado</div>';
  } else {
    list.innerHTML=items.slice(0,10).map((it,i)=>`
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:8px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(45,107,74,.08)">
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
          <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:260px;color:#1a2e22">${it.nome||'—'}</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(26,46,34,.55);margin-top:1px">${it.loja||'—'} · ${it.seg||'—'}</div>
        </div>
        <div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:#2d6b4a;flex-shrink:0;margin-left:8px;font-weight:600">${fv(it.v)}</div>
      </div>`).join('');
  }
  document.getElementById('br-drawer').style.right='0';
  document.getElementById('br-overlay').style.display='block';
}

/* ── FORNECEDOR ITEMS (RS) ── */
function showFornItems(fornNome, seg){
  // Filtra BRIDGE_ITEMS pelo fornecedor, segmento e exclui filiais 300/203
  const EXCL_FILIAIS = ['300','203'];
  const items = D.BRIDGE_ITEMS.filter(it=>{
    if(!it.forn || it.forn.trim().toUpperCase() !== fornNome.trim().toUpperCase()) return false;
    if(seg && it.seg !== seg) return false;
    // Exclui filiais não monitoradas (verifica pelo nome da loja)
    return true; // filtragem por unidade já feita no processamento
  }).slice(0,10);

  const panel = document.getElementById('rs-forn-items');
  const title = document.getElementById('rs-forn-items-title');
  const list  = document.getElementById('rs-forn-items-list');

  title.textContent = 'Top 10 Itens — '+fornNome+' · '+fmtFull(LAST_DATE);

  if(!items.length){
    list.innerHTML='<div style="color:var(--muted);padding:12px;font-size:11px">Nenhum item encontrado para este fornecedor</div>';
  } else {
    list.innerHTML=`
      <table class="tbl" style="width:100%">
        <thead><tr>
          <th>#</th><th>Produto</th><th>Loja</th><th>Segmento</th>
          <th style="text-align:right">Status</th>
          <th style="text-align:right">Valor</th>
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          ${items.map((it,i)=>`<tr>
            <td class="rk">${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}</td>
            <td style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;max-width:250px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis">${it.nome||'—'}</td>
            <td style="font-size:9px;color:#ffd166">${it.loja||'—'}</td>
            <td style="font-size:9px;color:${sc(it.seg||'')}">${(it.seg||'—').replace('PET ','')}</td>
            <td style="font-size:9px;text-align:right;color:${it.status&&it.status.includes('SEM PEDIDO')?'#ff4444':it.status&&it.status.includes('PEDIDO')?'#ff9999':'#7a8b80'}">${it.status||'—'}</td>
            <td style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:#f4a85d;text-align:right">${fv(it.v||0)}</td>
          </tr>`).join('')}
        </tbody>
      </table>`;
  }
  panel.style.display='block';
  panel.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'nearest'});
}

/* ── RUPTURA SEGMENTOS ── */
function initRS(){
  document.getElementById('rs-fps').innerHTML=VALID_SEGS.map((s,i)=>
    `<button class="fp${i===0?' on':''}" onclick="selRS('${s}',this)">${s.replace('PET ','')}</button>`).join('');
  selRS(VALID_SEGS[0], document.querySelector('#rs-fps .fp'));
}

function selRS(seg,btn){
  document.querySelectorAll('#rs-fps .fp').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));
  if(btn) btn.classList.add('on');
  CUR_RS=seg;

  const meta=SEG_METAS[seg]||10; const c=sc(seg);
  const st=D.SEGS_TODAY.find(x=>x.s===seg)||{v:0,p:0};
  const ddeO=D.DIAS_SEG.find(s=>s.s===seg)||{d:0};
  const ok=st.p<=meta;

  // ── Header ──
  document.getElementById('rs-seg-nm').textContent=seg;
  document.getElementById('rs-seg-nm').style.color='#7dd4a0';
  document.getElementById('rs-h-pct').textContent=st.p.toFixed(2)+'%';
  document.getElementById('rs-h-pct').style.color=ok?'#a8f0c8':'#ff9999';
  document.getElementById('rs-h-val').textContent=fv(st.v);
  document.getElementById('rs-h-meta').textContent=meta+'%';
  document.getElementById('rs-h-meta').style.color='#ffffff';
  const ddeMeta = getDdeMeta(seg, LAST_DATE);
  const ddeRealStr = ddeO.d ? ddeO.d.toFixed(0)+'d' : '—';
  document.getElementById('rs-h-dde').innerHTML =
    `<span style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#ffd166">${ddeRealStr}</span>` +
    (ddeMeta ? `<span style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);margin-left:4px">/ meta ${ddeMeta}d</span>` : '');
  // Badge status DDE
  const ddeStatusEl = document.getElementById('rs-h-dde-status');
  if(ddeStatusEl){
    if(!ddeO.d || !ddeMeta){
      ddeStatusEl.textContent='DDE —'; ddeStatusEl.className='stb';
      ddeStatusEl.style.background='rgba(45,107,74,.06)'; ddeStatusEl.style.color='#7a8b80';
    } else if(ddeO.d <= ddeMeta){
      ddeStatusEl.textContent='DDE ✓ Meta'; ddeStatusEl.className='stb stb-ok';
      ddeStatusEl.style.background=''; ddeStatusEl.style.color='';
    } else {
      ddeStatusEl.textContent='DDE ▲ +'+(ddeO.d-ddeMeta).toFixed(0)+'d'; ddeStatusEl.className='stb stb-crit';
      ddeStatusEl.style.background=''; ddeStatusEl.style.color='';
    }
  }
  const stEl=document.getElementById('rs-h-status');
  stEl.textContent=ok?'✓ Meta':'Acima da meta';
  stEl.className='stb '+(ok?'stb-ok':'stb-crit');
  document.getElementById('rs-seg-lbl').textContent=seg;

  // ── Gráfico: % Ruptura (linha vermelha) + Valor R$ (barras) + DDE (linha amarela) ──
  const ld=LAST_DATE;
  const lastStr=ld.toISOString().slice(0,10);
  const mes=ld.getMonth(), ano=ld.getFullYear();
  // Filtra só o mês atual
  // Filtra mês atual — compara string diretamente para evitar problema de timezone
  const mesStr = String(ano)+'-'+String(mes+1).padStart(2,'0');
  let series;
  if(RS_DAYS>0){
    // Modo N dias
    const cutoffRsD = new Date(ld); cutoffRsD.setDate(cutoffRsD.getDate()-(RS_DAYS-1));
    const cutRsDStr = cutoffRsD.toISOString().slice(0,10);
    series = (D.SEG_SERIES[seg]||[]).filter(x=>x.d>=cutRsDStr&&x.d<=lastStr);
  } else {
    // Modo mês atual
    series=(D.SEG_SERIES[seg]||[]).filter(x=>x.d.startsWith(mesStr));
    if(series.length && series[series.length-1].d < lastStr){
      const lastPt = (D.SEG_SERIES[seg]||[]).find(x=>x.d===lastStr);
      if(lastPt) series = [...series, lastPt];
    } else if(!series.length){
      const cutoff = new Date(ld); cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate()-31);
      const cutStr = cutoff.toISOString().slice(0,10);
      series = (D.SEG_SERIES[seg]||[]).filter(x=>x.d>=cutStr&&x.d<=lastStr);
    }
  }
  console.log('[RS] seg='+seg+' mesStr='+mesStr+' series pts='+series.length+(series.length?(' ultimo='+series[series.length-1].d+' v='+series[series.length-1].v.toFixed(0)+' p='+series[series.length-1].p.toFixed(2)):''));
  console.log('[RS] SEG_SERIES total pts='+((D.SEG_SERIES[seg]||[]).length)+' ultimo_geral='+((D.SEG_SERIES[seg]||[]).slice(-1)[0]?.d||'?'));
  // DDE do segmento específico (série histórica)
  const segDdeArr = D.DIAS_SEG_SERIES[seg]||[];
  const diasMap={}; segDdeArr.forEach(x=>diasMap[x.d]=x.v);
  const ddeData=series.map(x=>diasMap[x.d]||null);

  // Plugin RS — por label (datasets dinâmicos)
  const rsLabelPlugin = {
    id:'rsLabels',
    afterDatasetsDraw(chart){
      const ctx=chart.ctx;
      chart.data.datasets.forEach((ds,di)=>{
        const lbl=ds.label||'';
        const meta=chart.getDatasetMeta(di);
        if(meta.hidden) return;
        if(ds.type==='bar'){
          const isCCD = lbl.includes('c/ CD');
          meta.data.forEach((bar,i)=>{
            const val=ds.data[i]; if(!val||val<=0) return;
            const barH=bar.base-bar.y; if(barH<12) return;
            ctx.save();
            ctx.translate(bar.x,bar.y+barH/2); ctx.rotate(-Math.PI/2);
            ctx.font='bold 12px DM Mono,monospace';
            ctx.fillStyle=isCCD?'#ffffff':'#3a4a3e';
            ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='middle';
            ctx.fillText(fv(val),0,0); ctx.restore();
          });
        } else if(ds.type==='line'){
          if(lbl.includes('% s/')||lbl.includes('% c/')){
            const col=ds.borderColor||(lbl.includes('% s/')? '#7dd4a0':'#2d6b4a');
            const above=lbl.includes('% s/');
            meta.data.forEach((pt,i)=>{
              const val=ds.data[i]; if(val==null) return;
              ctx.save(); ctx.font='bold 10px Inter,sans-serif'; ctx.fillStyle=col;
              ctx.textAlign='center';
              if(above){ ctx.textBaseline='bottom'; ctx.fillText(val.toFixed(1)+'%',pt.x,pt.y-4); }
              else      { ctx.textBaseline='top';    ctx.fillText(val.toFixed(1)+'%',pt.x,pt.y+3); }
              ctx.restore();
            });
          } else if(lbl==='DDE'){
            meta.data.forEach((pt,i)=>{
              const val=ds.data[i]; if(val==null) return;
              ctx.save(); ctx.font='bold 10px DM Mono,monospace'; ctx.fillStyle='#7a8b80';
              ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='top';
              ctx.fillText(Math.round(val)+'d',pt.x,pt.y+3); ctx.restore();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    }
  };

  destroyChart('cRsSeg');
  const ctx=document.getElementById('cRsSeg').getContext('2d');
  // Dados c/ CD para o segmento atual — cutoffRS baseado no início da série
  const cutoffRS = new Date(ld); cutoffRS.setDate(cutoffRS.getDate()-31);
  const cdSegSeries = D.SEG_CD_SERIES[seg]||[];
  const cutoffCdSeg = (series.length ? series[0].d : cutoffRS.toISOString().slice(0,10));
  const cdSegFiltered = cdSegSeries.filter(x=>x.d>=cutoffCdSeg&&x.d<=lastStr);
  const cdSegMap={}; cdSegFiltered.forEach(x=>{ cdSegMap[x.d]={v:x.v,p:x.p}; });
  const cdSegV = series.map(x=>cdSegMap[x.d]?.v||null);
  const cdSegP = series.map(x=>cdSegMap[x.d]?.p||null);

  // Modo: s/CD, c/CD ou ambos
  const rsBoth = RS_CD_SCD && RS_CD_CCD;
  const rsScaleMax = rsBoth
    ? (()=>{ const mxS=Math.max(...series.map(x=>x.v),1); return mxS*1.4; })()
    : (()=>{ const vals=RS_CD_SCD?series.map(x=>x.v):cdSegV.filter(Boolean); const mx=Math.max(...vals,1); return mx*1.1; })();

  const rsDatasets = [];
  if(RS_CD_SCD) rsDatasets.push(
    {type:'bar', label:'Valor s/ CD',data:series.map(x=>x.v),backgroundColor:'#7dd4a060',borderColor:'#7dd4a0',borderWidth:1,yAxisID:'yV',order:4},
    {type:'line',label:'% s/ CD',   data:series.map(x=>x.p),borderColor:'#7dd4a0',backgroundColor:'#7dd4a015',fill:false,borderWidth:2.5,pointRadius:5,pointBackgroundColor:'#7dd4a0',tension:.3,yAxisID:'yP',order:1}
  );
  if(RS_CD_CCD) rsDatasets.push(
    {type:'bar', label:'Valor c/ CD',data:cdSegV,backgroundColor:'#4a9e6e',borderColor:'#2d6b4a',borderWidth:2,yAxisID:'yV',order:5},
    {type:'line',label:'% c/ CD',   data:cdSegP,borderColor:'#2d6b4a',backgroundColor:'transparent',fill:false,borderWidth:2,pointRadius:4,pointBackgroundColor:'#2d6b4a',tension:.3,yAxisID:'yP',order:2,borderDash:[4,2]}
  );
  rsDatasets.push(
    {type:'line',label:'Meta '+meta+'%',data:series.map(()=>meta),borderColor:'rgba(255,255,255,.25)',borderWidth:1.5,borderDash:[5,4],pointRadius:0,fill:false,yAxisID:'yP',order:3},
    {type:'line',label:'DDE',data:ddeData,borderColor:'#7a8b80',backgroundColor:'transparent',borderWidth:1.5,borderDash:[3,3],pointRadius:3,pointBackgroundColor:'#7a8b80',tension:.3,yAxisID:'yD',order:3}
  );

  CHARTS.cRsSeg=new Chart(ctx,{type:'bar',data:{labels:series.map(x=>fmtISO(x.d)),datasets:rsDatasets},plugins:[rsLabelPlugin],options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,interaction:{mode:'index',intersect:false},
    plugins:{legend:{display:true,position:'top',labels:{color:'rgba(26,46,34,.6)',usePointStyle:true,padding:10,font:{size:9}}},
      tooltip:{...BO.plugins.tooltip,callbacks:{label:c=>{
        const lbl=c.dataset.label||'';
        if(lbl.includes('Valor s/')) return c.raw? ` Valor s/ CD: ${fv(c.raw)}`:null;
        if(lbl.includes('Valor c/')) return c.raw? ` Valor c/ CD: ${fv(c.raw)}`:null;
        if(lbl.includes('% s/'))    return c.raw? ` % s/ CD: ${c.raw.toFixed(2)}%`:null;
        if(lbl.includes('% c/'))    return c.raw? ` % c/ CD: ${c.raw.toFixed(2)}%`:null;
        if(lbl==='DDE'&&c.raw!=null) return ` DDE: ${Math.round(c.raw)}d`;
        return null;
      }}}},
    scales:{x:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{color:'rgba(26,46,34,.4)',font:{size:9},maxTicksLimit:20}},
      yP:{position:'left',grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.04)'},ticks:{color:'#ff6b6b80',callback:v=>v+'%',font:{size:9}}},
      yV:{position:'right',grid:{display:false},ticks:{display:false},max:rsScaleMax},
      yD:{position:'right',display:false}}}});

  // ── Painel lateral: bridge do segmento (calculado direto de D.BRIDGE_ITEMS)
  // Para cada status, soma o valor do segmento e divide pelo total geral do status
  // Isso dá a participação percentual do segmento dentro de cada categoria bridge
  const totalPct=st.p; const totalVal=st.v;
  const brDef=[
    {label:'Sit. c/ Pedido', keys:['PEDIDO PENDENTE','SITUAÇÃO CRÍTICA - PEDIDO','SITUACAO CRITICA - PEDIDO','- PEDIDO'], col:'#ff4444'},
    {label:'Sit. s/ Pedido', keys:['SEM PEDIDO','SITUAÇÃO CRÍTICA - SEM','SITUACAO CRITICA - SEM','- SEM'],              col:'#ff9999'},
    {label:'CD Insuf.',      keys:['CD INSUFICIENTE','INSUFICIENTE P/','CD INSUF'],                            col:'#f4a030'},
    {label:'CD Atende',      keys:['CD ATENDE LOJA','CD ATENDE','ATENDE LOJA','PRENOTA'],                      col:'#34c97a'},
    {label:'Est. Neg.',      keys:['ESTOQUE NEGATIVO','NEGATIVO'],                                             col:'#ffd166'},
  ];
  // Soma valor por status: geral e do segmento
  const brTotGeral={}, brTotSeg={};
  D.BRIDGE_ITEMS.forEach(it=>{
    const stUp=(it.status||'').toUpperCase().trim();
    // Identifica qual categoria
    let cat=null;
    for(const d of brDef){
      if(d.keys.some(k=>stUp.includes(k.toUpperCase()))){ cat=d.label; break; }
    }
    if(!cat) return;
    brTotGeral[cat]=(brTotGeral[cat]||0)+it.v;
    if(it.seg===seg) brTotSeg[cat]=(brTotSeg[cat]||0)+it.v;
  });
  // pp = (valor segmento no status / valor geral do status) * pp geral do status
  const brGeral=D.BRIDGE||{pct:0,val:0,statuses:[]};
  const bridgeStats=brDef.map((bd,i)=>{
    const vGeral=brTotGeral[bd.label]||0;
    const vSeg=brTotSeg[bd.label]||0;
    // pp geral do status (da bridge real ou estimado)
    const ppGeralStatus=brGeral.statuses[i]?brGeral.statuses[i].pp:(brGeral.pct||totalPct)*[.614,.102,.252,.032][i];
    // participação do segmento = vSeg/vGeral * ppGeralStatus
    const pp=vGeral>0?(vSeg/vGeral*ppGeralStatus):0;
    return {label:bd.label, col:bd.col, pp:pp.toFixed(2), v:vSeg};
  });
  document.getElementById('rs-bridge-cards').innerHTML=bridgeStats.map(s=>`
    <div style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid ${s.col};border-radius:8px;padding:9px 12px">
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:${s.col};font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px">${s.label}</div>
      <div style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:${s.col};margin-top:2px">${s.pp}pp</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:1px">${fv(s.v)}</div>
    </div>`).join('');

  const topIt=D.SEG_ITEMS[seg]&&D.SEG_ITEMS[seg][0];
  document.getElementById('rs-top-item-card').innerHTML=topIt
    ? `<div style="font-size:9px;color:#ffd166;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px">⭐ Top Item Crítico</div>
       <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#3a4a3e;line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:4px">${topIt.nome}</div>
       <div style="font-size:9px;color:#ffd166;margin-bottom:2px">${topIt.loja||'—'}</div>
       <div style="font-family:'AllerDisplay',sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:#f4a85d">${fv(topIt.v)}</div>
       ${topIt.pct?`<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px">${topIt.pct.toFixed(2)}pp</div>`:''}`
    : '<div style="color:var(--muted);font-size:10px">—</div>';

  // ── Tabela Fornecedores multi-dia ──
  // Simplesmente pega as 3 últimas datas do índice FORN_BY_DATE
  const allDatesF = Object.keys(D.FORN_BY_DATE||{}).sort().slice(-3);
  console.log('[RS] FORN_BY_DATE todas datas:', Object.keys(D.FORN_BY_DATE||{}).sort().slice(-5).join(', '));
  console.log('[RS] allDatesF:', allDatesF.join(', '));
  document.getElementById('rs-forn-dt').textContent=allDatesF.map(d=>fmtISO(d)).join(' · ');

  // Pega fornecedores do segmento
  // Compara normalizado (sem PET, uppercase, trim)
  const normSeg = seg.replace(/^PET /,'').replace(/^PET/,'').trim().toUpperCase();
  const fornSeg = D.FORN.filter(f=>{
    if(!f.seg) return false;
    const fSeg = f.seg.replace(/^PET /,'').replace(/^PET/,'').trim().toUpperCase();
    return fSeg===normSeg || fSeg.includes(normSeg) || normSeg.includes(fSeg);
  });
  console.log('[RS] seg='+seg+' normSeg='+normSeg+' fornSeg='+fornSeg.length+' D.FORN total='+D.FORN.length);
  console.log('[RS] amostra D.FORN segs:', [...new Set(D.FORN.slice(0,20).map(f=>f.seg))].join(', '));
  const topForn = (fornSeg.length ? fornSeg : D.FORN).slice(0,10);

  // Monta cabeçalho multi-dia
  const headCols = allDatesF.map(d=>`<th colspan="3" style="text-align:center;color:var(--g1);font-size:9px">${fmtISO(d)}</th>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('rs-forn-head').innerHTML=`
    <tr><th rowspan="2">#</th><th rowspan="2">Fornecedor</th>${headCols}</tr>
    <tr>${allDatesF.map(()=>'<th style="text-align:right;font-size:8px">%</th><th style="text-align:right;font-size:8px">R$</th><th style="text-align:right;font-size:8px;color:#ffd166">DDE</th>').join('')}</tr>`;

  // Para cada fornecedor, busca no índice FORN_BY_DATE (pré-construído)
  function getFornDayData(fn, dateStr){
    const dayData = D.FORN_BY_DATE[dateStr];
    if(!dayData) return {p:0,v:0,dde:0};
    // Tenta nome exato primeiro, depois case-insensitive
    let entry = dayData[fn];
    if(!entry){
      const fnUp=fn.trim().toUpperCase();
      const key=Object.keys(dayData).find(k=>k.trim().toUpperCase()===fnUp);
      entry = key ? dayData[key] : null;
    }
    if(!entry) return {p:0,v:0,dde:0};
    const dde = D.DDE_FORN_MAP[fn]||0;
    return {p:entry.p, v:entry.v, dde};
  }

  document.getElementById('rs-forn-tbl').innerHTML=topForn.map((f,i)=>{
    const dayCells=allDatesF.map(d=>{
      const dd=getFornDayData(f.f,d);
      return `<td style="text-align:right;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:#2d6b4a;font-weight:600">${dd.p>0?'+'+dd.p.toFixed(1)+'%':'—'}</td>
              <td style="text-align:right;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:#3a8a5c">${dd.v>0?fv(dd.v):'—'}</td>
              <td style="text-align:right;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:#5a9a70">${dd.dde>0?dd.dde.toFixed(1)+'d':'—'}</td>`;
    }).join('');
    const evenRow = i%2===0;
    const rowBg = evenRow ? 'background:#ffffff' : 'background:#f0f4f0';
    return `<tr style="${rowBg};cursor:pointer" onclick="showFornItems('${f.f.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}','${seg}')" title="Clique para ver top 10 itens">
      <td class="rk" style="color:#2d6b4a;opacity:.5">${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}</td>
      <td style="font-size:9px;max-width:180px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;color:#2d6b4a;font-weight:600">${f.f} <span style="font-size:8px;opacity:.4">→</span></td>
      ${dayCells}</tr>`;
  }).join('');
}

/* ── TENDÊNCIA ── */
function initTend(){
  document.getElementById('td-range').textContent = (D.SERIE[0]?.d?.slice(0,7)||'')+' → '+fmtFull(LAST_DATE);
  destroyChart('cTend');
  const ctx=document.getElementById('cTend').getContext('2d');
  const gg=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,240); gg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(94,217,160,.22)'); gg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(94,217,160,0)');
  CHARTS.cTend=new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels:D.SERIE.map(d=>d.d.slice(5)),datasets:[
    {data:D.SERIE.map(d=>d.p),borderColor:'#5ed9a0',backgroundColor:gg,fill:true,tension:.4,borderWidth:2,pointRadius:0,pointHoverRadius:4},
    {data:D.SERIE.map(()=>10),borderColor:'rgba(255,107,107,.35)',borderWidth:1,borderDash:[4,4],fill:false,pointRadius:0}
  ]},options:{...BO,plugins:{...BO.plugins,tooltip:{...BO.plugins.tooltip,callbacks:{label:c=>`${c.raw.toFixed(2)}%`}}},
    scales:{x:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{maxTicksLimit:14,color:'rgba(26,46,34,.4)'}},y:{...BO.scales.y,ticks:{callback:v=>v+'%'}}}}});
  document.getElementById('td-fps').innerHTML=VALID_SEGS.map((s,i)=>
    `<button class="fp${i===0?' on':''}" onclick="selTs('${s}',this)">${s.replace('PET ','')}</button>`).join('');
  selTs(VALID_SEGS[0],document.querySelector('#td-fps .fp'));
}
function selTs(seg,btn){
  document.querySelectorAll('#td-fps .fp').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));
  if(btn) btn.classList.add('on');
  CUR_TS=seg;
  const data=D.SEG_SERIES[seg]||[]; const c=sc(seg);
  destroyChart('cTendSeg');
  const ctx=document.getElementById('cTendSeg').getContext('2d');
  const gg=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,230); gg.addColorStop(0,c+'30'); gg.addColorStop(1,c+'00');
  CHARTS.cTendSeg=new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels:data.map(d=>d.d.slice(5)),datasets:[
    {type:'line',label:'Valor R$',data:data.map(d=>d.v),borderColor:c,backgroundColor:gg,fill:true,tension:.4,borderWidth:2,pointRadius:3,yAxisID:'yV'},
    {type:'line',label:'% Ruptura',data:data.map(d=>d.p),borderColor:'#ffd166',fill:false,tension:.4,borderWidth:1.5,borderDash:[4,3],pointRadius:2,yAxisID:'yP'}
  ]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,
    plugins:{legend:{display:true,position:'top',labels:{color:'rgba(26,46,34,.6)',usePointStyle:true,padding:10,font:{size:10}}},
      tooltip:{...BO.plugins.tooltip,callbacks:{label:c=>c.datasetIndex===0?fv(c.raw):`${c.raw.toFixed(2)}%`}}},
    scales:{x:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{maxTicksLimit:10,color:'rgba(26,46,34,.4)'}},
      yV:{position:'left',grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.04)'},ticks:{color:'#3a4a3e',callback:v=>fv(v)}},
      yP:{position:'right',grid:{display:false},ticks:{color:'#ffd16699',callback:v=>v+'%'}}}}});
}

function closeBrDrawer(){
  document.getElementById('br-drawer').style.right='-490px';
  document.getElementById('br-overlay').style.display='none';
}

function toggleSidebar(){
  const sb=document.getElementById('app-sidebar');
  const ct=document.getElementById('app-content');
  sb.classList.toggle('collapsed');
  ct.classList.toggle('expanded');
}

/* ── UTILS ── */
function destroyChart(id){ if(CHARTS[id]){CHARTS[id].destroy();delete CHARTS[id];} }

function showTab(id,el){
  document.querySelectorAll('.sec').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('on'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.sb-tab,.tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('on'));
  document.getElementById('s-'+id).classList.add('on');
  el.classList.add('on');
  // Bridge tab: full width already handled by .main CSS
  if(!tabInit[id]){
    tabInit[id]=true;
    if(id==='fn') initForn();
    if(id==='br') initBridge();
    if(id==='rs') initRS();
  }
  if(id==='lj') initLojas();
}

/* ── FULLSCREEN ── */
let fsChart=null;
function openFS(canvasId){
  const src=Object.values(CHARTS).find(c=>c&&c.canvas&&c.canvas.id===canvasId);
  if(!src) return;
  const card=src.canvas.closest('.card');
  document.getElementById('fsTitle').textContent=card?card.querySelector('.ct')?.textContent||'Gráfico':'Gráfico';
  if(fsChart){fsChart.destroy();fsChart=null;}
  document.getElementById('fsOverlay').classList.add('show');

  // Para cSerie e cRsSeg: recria com plugin de labels ativo no fullscreen
  if(canvasId==='cSerie' || canvasId==='cRsSeg'){
    const srcChart = CHARTS[canvasId];
    if(!srcChart) return;
    // Plugin de labels fullscreen — fontes maiores
    // Plugin fullscreen — por label, funciona com datasets dinâmicos
    const fsLabelPlugin = {
      id:'fsLabels',
      afterDatasetsDraw(chart){
        const ctx=chart.ctx;
        chart.data.datasets.forEach((ds,di)=>{
          const lbl=ds.label||'';
          const meta=chart.getDatasetMeta(di);
          if(meta.hidden) return;
          if(ds.type==='bar'){
            // Barras — valor R$ vertical dentro
            const isCCD = lbl.includes('c/ CD');
            meta.data.forEach((bar,i)=>{
              const val=ds.data[i]; if(!val||val<=0) return;
              const barH=bar.base-bar.y; if(barH<14) return;
              ctx.save();
              ctx.translate(bar.x, bar.y+barH/2); ctx.rotate(-Math.PI/2);
              ctx.font='bold 13px DM Mono,monospace';
              ctx.fillStyle=isCCD?'#ffffff':'#3a4a3e';
              ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='middle';
              ctx.fillText(fv(val),0,0); ctx.restore();
            });
          } else if(ds.type==='line'){
            if(lbl.includes('% s/')||lbl.includes('% c/')){
              // Linhas % — label nos pontos
              const col = ds.borderColor || (lbl.includes('% s/') ? '#7dd4a0' : '#2d6b4a');
              const above = lbl.includes('% s/');
              meta.data.forEach((pt,i)=>{
                const val=ds.data[i]; if(val==null) return;
                ctx.save(); ctx.font='bold 12px Inter,sans-serif'; ctx.fillStyle=col;
                ctx.textAlign='center';
                if(above){ ctx.textBaseline='bottom'; ctx.fillText(val.toFixed(1)+'%',pt.x,pt.y-6); }
                else      { ctx.textBaseline='top';    ctx.fillText(val.toFixed(1)+'%',pt.x,pt.y+5); }
                ctx.restore();
              });
            } else if(lbl==='DDE'){
              meta.data.forEach((pt,i)=>{
                const val=ds.data[i]; if(val==null) return;
                ctx.save(); ctx.font='bold 11px DM Mono,monospace'; ctx.fillStyle='#7a8b80';
                ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='top';
